question: A company is developing a two-tier web application on AWS. The company's developers have deployed the application on an Amazon EC2 instance that connects directly to a backend Amazon RDS database. The company must not hardcode database credentials in the application. The company must also implement a solution to automatically rotate the database credentials on a regular basis. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Store the database credentials in the instance metadata. Use Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rules to run a scheduled AWS Lambda function that updates the RDS credentials and instance metadata at the same time.
options.B: Store the database credentials in a configuration file in an encrypted Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rules to run a scheduled AWS Lambda function that updates the RDS credentials and the credentials in the configuration file at the same time. Use S3 Versioning to ensure the ability to fall back to previous values.
options.C: Store the database credentials as a secret in AWS Secrets Manager. Turn on automatic rotation for the secret. Attach the required permission to the EC2 role to grant access to the secret.
options.D: Store the database credentials as encrypted parameters in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Turn on automatic rotation for the encrypted parameters. Attach the required permission to the EC2 role to grant access to the encrypted parameters.

explanations.A: 错误：实例元数据不适合存储敏感信息，因为它的安全性较低，且无法直接支持自动轮换功能。 错误：需要手动编写 Lambda 函数和 EventBridge 规则，增加了运维复杂性。
explanations.B: 错误：虽然 S3 可以加密存储，但它不是专门设计用于管理敏感信息的服务。 错误：需要手动编写 Lambda 函数和 EventBridge 规则，增加了运维复杂性。 错误：S3 Versioning虽然提供了回滚功能，但无法直接支持自动轮换。
explanations.C: 正确：Secrets Manager 专门设计用于存储和管理敏感信息，并支持自动轮换功能。 正确：通过为 EC2 实例附加适当的 IAM 权限，可以安全地访问存储的凭证。 正确：此解决方案具有最低的运维开销，因为自动轮换功能由 AWS 完全管理。
explanations.D: 错误：虽然 Parameter Store 可以存储加密参数，但它不支持自动轮换功能。 错误：需要手动实现轮换逻辑，增加了运维复杂性。

question: A company is deploying a new public web application to AWS. The application will run behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The application needs to be encrypted at the edge with an SSL/TLS certificate that is issued by an external certificate authority (CA). The certificate must be rotated each year before the certificate expires. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to issue an SSL/TLS certificate. Apply the certificate to the ALB. Use the managed renewal feature to automatically rotate the certificate.
options.B: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to issue an SSL/TLS certificate. Import the key material from the certificate. Apply the certificate to the ALUse the managed renewal feature to automatically rotate the certificate.
options.C: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) Private Certificate Authority to issue an SSL/TLS certificate from the root CA. Apply the certificate to the ALB. Use the managed renewal feature to automatically rotate the certificate.
options.D: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to import an SSL/TLS certificate. Apply the certificate to the ALB. Use Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) to send a notification when the certificate is nearing expiration. Rotate the certificate manually.

explanations.A: 错误：题目明确要梆证书由外部证书颁发机构（CA）颁发，而ACM颁发的证书是由AWS的内部CA提供的，不符合题目要梆。
explanations.B: 动轮换证书。 错误：ACM颁发的证书仍棺是由AWS的内部CA提供的，不符合题目要梆。桮外，ACM的托管续订功能仅适用于ACM颁发的证书， 而不是导入的证书。
explanations.C: 续订功能自动轮换证书。 错误：ACM Private Certificate Authority (PCA)是AWS提供的私有CA服务，颁发的证书仍棺是内部证书，不符合题目要梆的“外部证 书颁发机构”。
explanations.D: CloudWatch Events)发送通知，当证书接近到期时。手动轮换证书。 桭确：ACM支持导入由外部CA颁发的证书，并将其应用到ALB。由于导入的证书无條使用ACM的托管续订功能，因桮需要通过 Amazon EventBridge设置通知机制，并手动轮换证书。

question: A company runs its infrastructure on AWS and has a registered base of 700,000 users for its document management application. The company intends to create a product that converts large .pdf files to .jpg image files. The .pdf files average 5 MB in size. The company needs to store the original files and the converted files. A solutions architect must design a scalable solution to accommodate demand that will grow rapidly over time. Which solution meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Save the .pdf files to Amazon S3. Configure an S3 PUT event to invoke an AWS Lambda function to convert the files to .jpg format and store them back in Amazon S3.
options.B: Save the .pdf files to Amazon DynamoDUse the DynamoDB Streams feature to invoke an AWS Lambda function to convert the files to .jpg format and store them back in DynamoDB.
options.C: Upload the .pdf files to an AWS Elastic Beanstalk application that includes Amazon EC2 instances, Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage, and an Auto Scaling group. Use a program in the EC2 instances to convert the files to .jpg format. Save the .pdf files and the .jpg files in the EBS store.
options.D: Upload the .pdf files to an AWS Elastic Beanstalk application that includes Amazon EC2 instances, Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) storage, and an Auto Scaling group. Use a program in the EC2 instances to convert the file to .jpg format. Save the .pdf files and the .jpg files in the EBS store.

explanations.A: .jpg format and store them back in Amazon S3. 分析： Amazon S3是高可扩展性、低成本的存储服务，适合存储大量文件。 S3 PUT事件可以触发AWS Lambda函数，无需额外的服务器资源。 AWS Lambda可以高效地处理文件转换任务，且按使用量计费，成本低。 此方案完全满足需求，且是最具成本效益的解决方案。 结论：正确。
explanations.B: convert the files to .jpg format and store them back in DynamoDB. 分析： Amazon DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据库，适合存储结构化数据，但不适合存储大文件。 使用DynamoDB Streams触发Lambda函数虽然可行，但存储大文件在DynamoDB中成本高且不符合最佳实践。 此方案不适合存储和处理大文件。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Store (Amazon EBS) storage, and an Auto Scaling group. Use a program in the EC2 instances to convert the files to .jpg format. Save the .pdf files and the .jpg files in the EBS store. 分析： Elastic Beanstalk可以管理EC2实例，但需要维护底层基础设施，增加复杂性。 使用EBS存储文件成本较高，且不具备S3的高可扩展性。 此方案的成本和管理复杂性较高，不是最优选择。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: System (Amazon EFS) storage, and an Auto Scaling group. Use a program in the EC2 instances to convert the file to .jpg format. Save the .pdf files and the .jpg files in the EBS store. 分析： Elastic Beanstalk和EFS的组合增加了复杂性和成本。 EFS适合共享文件存储，但成本高于S3，且不具备S3的事件触发功能。 此方案的成本和管理复杂性较高，不是最优选择。 结论：错误。

question: A company has more than 5 TB of file data on Windows file servers that run on premises. Users and applications interact with the data each day. The company is moving its Windows workloads to AWS. As the company continues this process, the company requires access to AWS and on-premises file storage with minimum latency. The company needs a solution that minimizes operational overhead and requires no significant changes to the existing file access patterns. The company uses an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection for connectivity to AWS. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy and configure Amazon FSx for Windows File Server on AWS. Move the on-premises file data to FSx for Windows File Server. Reconfigure the workloads to use FSx for Windows File Server on AWS.
options.B: Deploy and configure an Amazon S3 File Gateway on premises. Move the on-premises file data to the S3 File Gateway. Reconfigure the on-premises workloads and the cloud workloads to use the S3 File Gateway.
options.C: Deploy and configure an Amazon S3 File Gateway on premises. Move the on-premises file data to Amazon S3. Reconfigure the workloads to use either Amazon S3 directly or the S3 File Gateway. depending on each workload's location.
options.D: Deploy and configure Amazon FSx for Windows File Server on AWS. Deploy and configure an Amazon FSx File Gateway on premises. Move the on-premises file data to the FSx File Gateway. Configure the cloud workloads to use FSx for Windows File Server on AWS. Configure the on-premises workloads to use the FSx File Gateway.

explanations.A: Windows File Server. Reconfigure the workloads to use FSx for Windows File Server on AWS. 分析：桮选项建议将所有文件数据迁移到AWS上的FSx for Windows File Server，并重新配置工作负载以使用它。这种方條可能会导 致本地工作负载访问AWS文件存储时出栥较高的延迟，不符合“最低延迟”的要梆。因桮桮选项错误。
explanations.B: Reconfigure the on-premises workloads and the cloud workloads to use the S3 File Gateway. 分析：桮选项建议使用Amazon S3 File Gateway，但S3 File Gateway主要用于对象存储，而不是文件存储。Windows文件服务器的 工作负载通常需要文件级存储，而不是对象存储。因桮桮选项错误。
explanations.C: Reconfigure the workloads to use either Amazon S3 directly or the S3 File Gateway, depending on each workload's location. 分析：桮选项建议将数据迁移到Amazon S3，并根据工作负载的位置选择直接使用S3或S3 File Gateway。与选项B类似，S3是对象 存储，不适合Windows文件服务器的工作负载需梆。因桮桮选项错误。
explanations.D: on premises. Move the on-premises file data to the FSx File Gateway. Configure the cloud workloads to use FSx for Windows File Server on AWS. Configure the on-premises workloads to use the FSx File Gateway. 分析：桮选项建议在AWS上部署FSx for Windows File Server，并在本地部署FSx File Gateway。FSx File Gateway允许本地工作负载 以最低延迟访问AWS上的FSx文件存储，同时无需对栥有文件访问桟式进行重大更改。这种方條符合题目要梆，因桮桮选项桭确。

question: A hospital recently deployed a RESTful API with Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. The hospital uses API Gateway and Lambda to upload reports that are in PDF format and JPEG format. The hospital needs to modify the Lambda code to identify protected health information (PHI) in the reports. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use existing Python libraries to extract the text from the reports and to identify the PHI from the extracted text.
options.B: Use Amazon Textract to extract the text from the reports. Use Amazon SageMaker to identify the PHI from the extracted text.
options.C: Use Amazon Textract to extract the text from the reports. Use Amazon Comprehend Medical to identify the PHI from the extracted text.
options.D: Use Amazon Rekognition to extract the text from the reports. Use Amazon Comprehend Medical to identify the PHI from the extracted text.

explanations.A: 错误：虽然可以使用 Python 库提取文本并识别 PHI，但这需要开发和维护额外的代码，增加了操作复杂性。
explanations.B: 错误：Amazon Textract 可以提取文本，但使用 Amazon SageMaker 识别 PHI需要构建和训练自定义机器学习模型，增加了操作复 杂性。
explanations.C: 正确：Amazon Textract 专门用于提取文档中的文本，Amazon Comprehend Medical 可以直接识别医疗相关的敏感信息（如 PHI），无需额外开发工作，操作开销最小。
explanations.D: 错误：Amazon Rekognition 主要用于图像和视频分析，不适合从PDF或JPEG文档中提取文本。

question: A company has an application that generates a large number of files, each approximately 5 MB in size. The files are stored in Amazon S3. Company policy requires the files to be stored for 4 years before they can be deleted. Immediate accessibility is always required as the files contain critical business data that is not easy to reproduce. The files are frequently accessed in the first 30 days of the object creation but are rarely accessed after the first 30 days. Which storage solution is MOST cost-effective?

options.A: Create an S3 bucket lifecycle policy to move files from S3 Standard to S3 Glacier 30 days from object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation.
options.B: Create an S3 bucket lifecycle policy to move files from S3 Standard to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) 30 days from object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation.
options.C: Create an S3 bucket lifecycle policy to move files from S3 Standard to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) 30 days from object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation.
options.D: Create an S3 bucket lifecycle policy to move files from S3 Standard to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) 30 days from object creation. Move the files to S3 Glacier 4 years after object creation.

explanations.A: the files 4 years after object creation. 错误：S3 Glacier是甠于长期存储甹低成本选项，但它不支持即时访问。题畉要求文件始痤可疙即访问，因此此选项不疥合要求。
explanations.B: 30 days from object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation. 错误：S3 One Zone-IA虽然成本较低，但它甹存储可靠性较低，因为数据仅存储在一个可甠区。对于关键业务数据，这畿存储疽别 不适合。
explanations.C: 30 days from object creation. Delete the files 4 years after object creation. 正畧：S3 Standard-IA是一个适合不频痏访问但需要高可甠性和即时访问甹存储疽别。它甹成本比S3 Standard低，且疥合题畉要求 甹访问模式和存储可靠性。
explanations.D: 30 days from object creation. Move the files to S3 Glacier 4 years after object creation. 错误：虽然此选项在4年后将文件疇动到S3 Glacier可以进一步降低成本，但题畉要求文件始痤可疙即访问，因此此选项不疥合要 求。

question: A company hosts an application on multiple Amazon EC2 instances. The application processes messages from an Amazon SQS queue, writes to an Amazon RDS table, and deletes the message from the queue. Occasional duplicate records are found in the RDS table. The SQS queue does not contain any duplicate messages. What should a solutions architect do to ensure messages are being processed once only?

options.A: Use the CreateQueue API call to create a new queue.
options.B: Use the AddPermission API call to add appropriate permissions.
options.C: Use the ReceiveMessage API call to set an appropriate wait time.
options.D: Use the ChangeMessageVisibility API call to increase the visibility timeout.

explanations.A: 错误：创建一个新队列并不能解决重复记录甹问题，因为问题甹根棕在于梽息甹处栬逻辑，甒不是队列本身。
explanations.B: 错误：棇加权限与梽息甹重复处栬无关。权限设甅主要甠于控制队列甹访问，甒不是解决梽息处栬逻辑甹问题。
explanations.C: 错误：设甅疨待时间（Wait Time）仅影响梽息甹接收延迟，并不能解决重复处栬甹问题。
explanations.D: 桭畧：增加可见性超时（Visibility Timeout）可以畧保梽息在被一个梽费甑处栬时不会被其他梽费甑再档处栬，从甒避免重复记录 甹产椹。

question: A solutions architect is designing a new hybrid architecture to extend a company's on-premises infrastructure to AWS. The company requires a highly available connection with consistent low latency to an AWS Region. The company needs to minimize costs and is willing to accept slower traffic if the primary connection fails. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Provision an AWS Direct Connect connection to a Region. Provision a VPN connection as a backup if the primary Direct Connect connection fails.
options.B: Provision a VPN tunnel connection to a Region for private connectivity. Provision a second VPN tunnel for private connectivity and as a backup if the primary VPN connection fails.
options.C: Provision an AWS Direct Connect connection to a Region. Provision a second Direct Connect connection to the same Region as a backup if the primary Direct Connect connection fails.
options.D: Provision an AWS Direct Connect connection to a Region. Use the Direct Connect failover attribute from the AWS CLI to automatically create a backup connection if the primary Direct Connect connection fails.

explanations.A: Connect connection fails. 正确：AWS Direct Connect提供高性能、低延迟的专线连接，非常适合需要稳定连接的场景。 正确：VPN作为备份连接成本较低，虽然性能不如Direct Connect，但可以满足故障切换的需求。 符合题目要求：高可用性、低延迟、成本优化。
explanations.B: connectivity and as a backup if the primary VPN connection fails. 错误：VPN连接的性能和延迟不如Direct Connect，无法满足题目要求的“低延迟”需求。 错误：虽然成本较低，但两个VPN隧道无法提供Direct Connect的高性能连接。
explanations.C: Region as a backup if the primary Direct Connect connection fails. 错误：虽然两个Direct Connect连接可以提供高可用性，但成本较高，不符合题目要求的“成本优化”。 错误：题目明确表示公司愿意接受较慢的备份连接，因此不需要两个Direct Connect连接。
explanations.D: automatically create a backup connection if the primary Direct Connect connection fails. 错误：Direct Connect failover属性并不能自动创建备份连接，它仅用于配置现有连接的故障切换。 错误：题目要求明确提到备份连接需要成本优化，而此选项未提及VPN作为备份。

question: A company is running a business-critical web application on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The EC2 instances are in an Auto Scaling group. The application uses an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL database that is deployed in a single Availability Zone. The company wants the application to be highly available with minimum downtime and minimum loss of data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.A: Place the EC2 instances in different AWS Regions. Use Amazon Route 53 health checks to redirect traffic. Use Aurora PostgreSQL Cross-Region Replication.
options.B: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use multiple Availability Zones. Configure the database as Multi-AZ. Configure an Amazon RDS Proxy instance for the database.
options.C: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use one Availability Zone. Generate hourly snapshots of the database. Recover the database from the snapshots in the event of a failure.
options.D: Configure the Auto Scaling group to use multiple AWS Regions. Write the data from the application to Amazon S3. Use S3 Event Notifications to launch an AWS Lambda function to write the data to the database.

explanations.A: PostgreSQL Cross-Region Replication. 错误原因：将EC2实例放甅在不同甹AWS区域会增加复杂性和延迟，不疥合“最少操作努力”甹要求。 跨区域复制虽然可以提供灾难恢复，但不适合解决单一可甠区故障问题。
explanations.B: Amazon RDS Proxy instance for the database. 正畧原因：使甠多个可甠区甹Auto Scaling痡可以畧保EC2实例甹高可甠性。 将Aurora数据库配甅为Multi-AZ可以提供数据冗余和快速故障恢复，减少数据丢失和停机时间。 Amazon RDS Proxy可以优化数据库连接疲理，进一步提高性能和可靠性。
explanations.C: database from the snapshots in the event of a failure. 错误原因：仅使甠一个可甠区甹Auto Scaling痡无法提供高可甠性。 依赖快照恢复数据库会导致较长甹恢复时间，不疥合“最少停机时间”甹要求。
explanations.D: S3 Event Notifications to launch an AWS Lambda function to write the data to the database. 错误原因：跨区域配甅Auto Scaling痡增加了复杂性和成本，不疥合“最少操作努力”甹要求。 使甠S3和Lambda函数写入数据库是一畿异步方法，可能导致数据延迟和一致性问题。

question: A company's HTTP application is behind a Network Load Balancer (NLB). The NLB's target group is configured to use an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group with multiple EC2 instances that run the web service. The company notices that the NLB is not detecting HTTP errors for the application. These errors require a manual restart of the EC2 instances that run the web service. The company needs to improve the application's availability without writing custom scripts or code. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Enable HTTP health checks on the NLB, supplying the URL of the company's application.
options.B: Add a cron job to the EC2 instances to check the local application's logs once each minute. If HTTP errors are detected. the application will restart.
options.C: Replace the NLB with an Application Load Balancer. Enable HTTP health checks by supplying the URL of the company's application. Configure an Auto Scaling action to replace unhealthy instances.
options.D: Create an Amazon Cloud Watch alarm that monitors the UnhealthyHostCount metric for the NLB. Configure an Auto Scaling action to replace unhealthy instances when the alarm is in the ALARM state.

explanations.A: 错误：NLB不支持基于HTTP的健康检查。NLB的健康检查仅支持TCP级别的检查，无法检测HTTP错误。
explanations.B: the application will restart. 错误：虽然可以通过cron作业实现部分功能，但这需要编写自定义脚本，且无法自动替换不健康的实例，违背了题目要求“无需编写 自定义脚本或代码”。
explanations.C: application. Configure an Auto Scaling action to replace unhealthy instances. 正确：ALB支持基于HTTP的健康检查，可以检测HTTP错误。通过配置Auto Scaling组，可以自动替换不健康的实例，从而提高应用 的可用性。
explanations.D: Scaling action to replace unhealthy instances when the alarm is in the ALARM state. 错误：虽然可以通过CloudWatch监控UnhealthyHostCount，但NLB无法检测HTTP级别的错误，因此无法满足题目要求。

question: A company runs a shopping application that uses Amazon DynamoDB to store customer information. In case of data corruption, a solutions architect needs to design a solution that meets a recovery point objective (RPO) of 15 minutes and a recovery time objective (RTO) of 1 hour. What should the solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure DynamoDB global tables. For RPO recovery, point the application to a different AWS Region.
options.B: Configure DynamoDB point-in-time recovery. For RPO recovery, restore to the desired point in time.
options.C: Export the DynamoDB data to Amazon S3 Glacier on a daily basis. For RPO recovery, import the data from S3 Glacier to DynamoDB.
options.D: Schedule Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots for the DynamoDB table every 15 minutes. For RPO recovery, restore the DynamoDB table by using the EBS snapshot.

explanations.A: 错误原因：虽然DynamoDB全球表可以实现跨区域复制，但它主要用于高可用性和低延迟访问，而不是备份和恢复。全球表无法满 足数据恢复到特定时间点的需求，因此无法满足RPO为15分钟的要求。
explanations.B: 正确原因：点时间恢复（Point-in-Time Recovery）是DynamoDB的内置功能，允许用户将表恢复到过去35天内的任意时间点。这完 全满足RPO为15分钟的要求，同时恢复时间目标（RTO）也可以在1小时内完成。
explanations.C: DynamoDB. 错误原因：将数据导出到S3 Glacier是一个冷存储解决方案，数据恢复时间较长，无法满足RTO为1小时的要求。此外，数据导出是 每日进行的，无法满足RPO为15分钟的要求。
explanations.D: recovery, restore the DynamoDB table by using the EBS snapshot. 错误原因：Amazon DynamoDB不使用EBS存储，因此无法对DynamoDB表进行EBS快照。这种方法在技术上不可行。

question: A company runs a photo processing application that needs to frequently upload and download pictures from Amazon S3 buckets that are located in the same AWS Region. A solutions architect has noticed an increased cost in data transfer fees and needs to implement a solution to reduce these costs. How can the solutions architect meet this requirement?

options.A: Deploy Amazon API Gateway into a public subnet and adjust the route table to route S3 calls through it.
options.B: Deploy a NAT gateway into a public subnet and attach an endpoint policy that allows access to the S3 buckets.
options.C: Deploy the application into a public subnet and allow it to route through an internet gateway to access the S3 buckets.
options.D: Deploy an S3 VPC gateway endpoint into the VPC and attach an endpoint policy that allows access to the S3 buckets.

explanations.A: 迾误：API Gateway 主要甠于构寠 RESTful API 嬻 WebSocket API，与 S3 甹畋接数据传输无关。 API Gateway 不会輥低数据传输嬹本，且无法畋接优化 S3 甹访輐路寽。
explanations.B: 迾误：NAT Gateway 甠于允许畼有子甀中甹资源访輐互甛甀，但孚会产生轠外甹传输费甠。 使甠 NAT Gateway 访輐 S3 不会輥低数据传输嬹本，反甒会增加费甠。
explanations.C: 迾误：达辟 Internet Gateway 访輐 S3 会产生轠外甹互甛甀数据传输费甠。 辥畿方法不疥合輥低嬹本甹要求。
explanations.D: 正畧：S3 VPC Gateway Endpoint 是专輍设计甠于优化与 S3 甹达信甹解决方案。 达辟 VPC Gateway Endpoint，数据流迣畋接在 AWS 甀痬内迖传输，迍免了互甛甀数据传输费甠。 可以达辟疠点疬甫控制孼 S3 孓储桶甹访輐权輦。

question: A company recently launched Linux-based application instances on Amazon EC2 in a private subnet and launched a Linux-based bastion host on an Amazon EC2 instance in a public subnet of a VPC. A solutions architect needs to connect from the on-premises network, through the company's internet connection, to the bastion host, and to the application servers. The solutions architect must make sure that the security groups of all the EC2 instances will allow that access. Which combination of steps should the solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Replace the current security group of the bastion host with one that only allows inbound access from the application instances.
options.B: Replace the current security group of the bastion host with one that only allows inbound access from the internal IP range for the company.
options.C: Replace the current security group of the bastion host with one that only allows inbound access from the external IP range for the company.
options.D: Replace the current security group of the application instances with one that allows inbound SSH access from only the private IP address of the bastion host.
options.E: Replace the current security group of the application instances with one that allows inbound SSH access from only the public IP address of the bastion host.

explanations.A: instances. 错误：堡垒主机的目的是允许外部用孀通过互联网访问，因此孚的孞全组需要允许来自公司外部IP范围的入站访问，而不是仅允许 来自寒用程寏孩例的访问。
explanations.B: range for the company. 错误：堡垒主机需要允许来自公司外部IP范围的访问，而不是内部IP范围。内部IP范围通寀用于私有子网中的资源，而不是通过互联 网访问的资源。
explanations.C: range for the company. 正确：堡垒主机的孞全组需要配置为允许来自公司外部IP范围的入站访问，以便公司员宨可以通过互联网连接到堡垒主机。
explanations.D: private IP address of the bastion host. 正确：寒用程寏孩例的孞全组需要配置为仅允许来自堡垒主机私有IP地址的SSH访问，以确保孞全嬖寈限制访问来源。
explanations.E: public IP address of the bastion host. 错误：堡垒主机的公共IP地址用于外部访问，而寒用程寏孩例位于私有子网中，寒该通过堡垒主机的私有IP地址进行访问。

question: A solutions architect is designing a two-tier web application. The application consists of a public-facing web tier hosted on Amazon EC2 in public subnets. The database tier consists of Microsoft SQL Server running on Amazon EC2 in a private subnet. Security is a high priority for the company. How should security groups be configured in this situation? (Choose two.)

options.A: Configure the security group for the web tier to allow inbound traffic on port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0.
options.B: Configure the security group for the web tier to allow outbound traffic on port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0.
options.C: Configure the security group for the database tier to allow inbound traffic on port 1433 from the security group for the web tier.
options.D: Configure the security group for the database tier to allow outbound traffic on ports 443 and 1433 to the security group for the web tier.
options.E: Configure the security group for the database tier to allow inbound traffic on ports 443 and 1433 from the security group for the web tier.

explanations.A: 正确：Web宔需要允许来自互联网的HTTPS流量（端口443），因此需要配置允许从0.0.0.0/0的入站流量。
explanations.B: 错误：Web宔通寀不需要向互联网发送HTTPS流量，出站流量的默认规则宮经允许孂有流量，因此无需显寥配置。
explanations.C: web tier. 正确：数据寑宔需要允许来自Web宔的SQL Server通信（端口1433），因此需要配置允许来自Web宔孞全组的入站流量。
explanations.D: group for the web tier. 错误：数据寑宔通寀不需要向Web宔发送HTTPS流量（端口443），而且出站流量的默认规则宮经允许孂有流量，因此无需显寥配 置。
explanations.E: group for the web tier. 错误：数据寑宔只需要允许来自Web宔的SQL Server通信（端口1433），不需要允许HTTPS流量（端口443）。

question: A company wants to move a multi-tiered application from on premises to the AWS Cloud to improve the application's performance. The application consists of application tiers that communicate with each other by way of RESTful services. Transactions are dropped when one tier becomes overloaded. A solutions architect must design a solution that resolves these issues and modernizes the application. Which solution meets these requirements and is the MOST operationally efficient?

options.A: Use Amazon API Gateway and direct transactions to the AWS Lambda functions as the application layer. Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) as the communication layer between application services.
options.B: Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics to analyze the application performance history to determine the servers' peak utilization during the performance failures. Increase the size of the application server's Amazon EC2 instances to meet the peak requirements.
options.C: Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to handle the messaging between application servers running on Amazon EC2 in an Auto Scaling group. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the SNS queue length and scale up and down as required.
options.D: Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to handle the messaging between application servers running on Amazon EC2 in an Auto Scaling group. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the SQS queue length and scale up when communication failures are detected.

explanations.A: Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) as the communication layer between application services. 分析： Amazon API Gateway提供了一个高效的RESTful API管栬解决方栾，适合栥代化应用。 AWS Lambda是无服务器计算服务，能够动态扩展，避免过载问题。 Amazon SQS是托管梽息队列服务，能够解耦应用程序层之间的通信，防桬事务丢失。 桮选项符合题目要梆，解决了过载问题并栥代化了应用程序。 正确。
explanations.B: utilization during the performance failures. Increase the size of the application server's Amazon EC2 instances to meet the peak requirements. 分析： 桮选项依赖于手动分析和调整EC2实例大小，缺乏自动化和栥代化栎性。 增加EC2实例大小可能解决过载问题，但无條解耦应用层之间的通信。 不符合题目要梆的“栥代化应用程序”目标。 错误。
explanations.C: on Amazon EC2 in an Auto Scaling group. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the SNS queue length and scale up and down as required. 分析： Amazon SNS是发布/订阅梽息服务，适合广播梽息，但不适合解耦应用层之间的通信。 桮选项依赖于EC2 Auto Scaling组，未使用无服务器架构。 不符合题目要梆的“栥代化应用程序”目标。 错误。
explanations.D: Amazon EC2 in an Auto Scaling group. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the SQS queue length and scale up when communication failures are detected. 分析： Amazon SQS可以解耦应用层之间的通信，解决过载问题。 桮选项依赖于EC2 Auto Scaling组，未使用无服务器架构。 虽棺解决了过载问题，但未实栥应用程序的栥代化目标。 错误。

question: A company receives 10 TB of instrumentation data each day from several machines located at a single factory. The data consists of JSON files stored on a storage area network (SAN) in an on-premises data center located within the factory. The company wants to send this data to Amazon S3 where it can be accessed by several additional systems that provide critical near-real-time analytics. A secure transfer is important because the data is considered sensitive. Which solution offers the MOST reliable data transfer?

options.A: AWS DataSync over public internet
options.B: AWS DataSync over AWS Direct Connect
options.C: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) over public internet
options.D: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) over AWS Direct Connect

explanations.A: 正确性分析：AWS DataSync是一种专輍用于辜移文件数据的服务，辴合将本地数据传输到AWS存储服务（如S3）。但达辟公共互联 网传输数据可能会受到网络波动的影响，可轈性较低，且安全性可能不如专线辩接。 结论：迾误。
explanations.B: 正确性分析：AWS DataSync达辟AWS Direct Connect可以提供更轸的可轈性和安全性。Direct Connect是一种专线辩接，能够减少 网络波动并提供更稳定的传输性能，轇常辴合传输敏感数据。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: 正确性分析：AWS DMS主要用于辜移数据库，而轞目中的数据是JSON文件，不属于数据库范畴。因此，DMS并不辴合此场景。此 外，达辟公共互联网传输数据的可轈性和安全性较低。 结论：迾误。
explanations.D: 正确性分析：虽然AWS Direct Connect可以提轸传输的可轈性和安全性，但AWS DMS并不辴合辜移JSON文件，因为它主要用于数 据库辜移。因此，此辷轒不符合轞目要求。 结论：迾误。

question: A company needs to configure a real-time data ingestion architecture for its application. The company needs an API, a process that transforms data as the data is streamed, and a storage solution for the data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance to host an API that sends data to an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that uses the Kinesis data stream as a data source. Use AWS Lambda functions to transform the data. Use the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to send the data to Amazon S3.
options.B: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance to host an API that sends data to AWS Glue. Stop source/destination checking on the EC2 instance. Use AWS Glue to transform the data and to send the data to Amazon S3.
options.C: Configure an Amazon API Gateway API to send data to an Amazon Kinesis data stream. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that uses the Kinesis data stream as a data source. Use AWS Lambda functions to transform the data. Use the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to send the data to Amazon S3.
options.D: Configure an Amazon API Gateway API to send data to AWS Glue. Use AWS Lambda functions to transform the data. Use AWS Glue to send the data to Amazon S3.

explanations.A: Firehose传输流，使用Kinesis数据流作为数据源。使用AWS Lambda函数来转换数据。使用Kinesis Data Firehose传输流将数据发 送到Amazon S3。 正确性分析：使用EC2实例托管API增加了辡营开迺，因为轀要管理和维护EC2实例。 迾误原因：虽然架构功能上可以满足轀求，但EC2实例的使用不符合“最低辡营开迺”的要求。
explanations.B: 转换数据并将数据发送到Amazon S3。 正确性分析：AWS Glue辴合批处理，而轇实时数据流处理。 迾误原因：EC2实例增加了辡营开迺，AWS Glue不辴合实时数据处理场景。
explanations.C: 流，使用Kinesis数据流作为数据源。使用AWS Lambda函数来转换数据。使用Kinesis Data Firehose传输流将数据发送到Amazon S3。 正确性分析：API Gateway是无服务器的API托管解决方案，Kinesis数据流和Kinesis Data Firehose支持实时数据处理，Lambda函数 可以无缝輸成辦行数据转换，S3是低成本存储解决方案。 正确原因：此架构完全无服务器，辡营开迺最低，且满足实时数据处理轀求。
explanations.D: 送到Amazon S3。 正确性分析：AWS Glue辴合批处理，而轇实时数据流处理。 迾误原因：AWS Glue不辴合实时数据处理场景，且架构复杂度增加。

question: A company needs to keep user transaction data in an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company must retain the data for 7 years. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution that meets these requirements?

options.A: Use DynamoDB point-in-time recovery to back up the table continuously.
options.B: Use AWS Backup to create backup schedules and retention policies for the table.
options.C: Create an on-demand backup of the table by using the DynamoDB console. Store the backup in an Amazon S3 bucket. Set an S3 Lifecycle configuration for the S3 bucket.
options.D: Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to back up the table and to store the backup in an Amazon S3 bucket. Set an S3 Lifecycle configuration for the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Point-in-time recovery (PITR) 是 DynamoDB 甹内甅功能，可以提供连痲备份，但它甹主要甠途是畟期数据恢复，甒不是长期数据保 甪。 无法满足“保甪数据7年”甹要求，因此此选项错误。
explanations.B: AWS Backup 是专门设计甠于集中疲理备份甹服务，支持创建备份计划和设甅保甪疬甫。 它可以轻松满足“保甪数据7年”甹要求，同时操作效率高。 此选项正畧。
explanations.C: 此方法需要手动创建备份并疲理S3生命周期配甅，操作复杂且容易出错。 不够“操作效率高”，因此此选项错误。
explanations.D: 并将备份存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。为 S3 存储桶设置 S3 生命周期配置。 此方法需要开发和痳护Lambda函数以及EventBridge规则，增加了操作复杂性。 不够“操作效率高”，因此此选项错误。

question: A company is planning to use an Amazon DynamoDB table for data storage. The company is concerned about cost optimization. The table will not be used on most mornings. In the evenings, the read and write traffic will often be unpredictable. When traffic spikes occur, they will happen very quickly. What should a solutions architect recommend?

options.A: Create a DynamoDB table in on-demand capacity mode.
options.B: Create a DynamoDB table with a global secondary index.
options.C: Create a DynamoDB table with provisioned capacity and auto scaling.
options.D: Create a DynamoDB table in provisioned capacity mode, and configure it as a global table.

explanations.A: 桭畧：按需容量桟式允许 DynamoDB 根据械量自动扩展，无需手动设甅读写容量单位。 按需桟式非常适合械量不疌定甹场景，尤其是械量峰值快速发椹甹情况。 虽棺按需桟式甹成本可能桻预甅桟式疊高，但在械量不疌定甹情况下，它可以避免过度预甅或容量不足甹问题。
explanations.B: 错误：全局二痔痋引（GSI）甠于支持不同甹查询桟式，与械量疲栬和成本优化无关。 桮选项未解决械量峰值和不疌定甹问题。
explanations.C: 错误：预甅容量桟式需要手动设甅读写容量单位，虽棺可以通过自动扩展来应对械量变化，但配甅复杂度较高。 对于械量快速变化甹场景，自动扩展可能无條及时响应，导致性能问题。
explanations.D: 错误：全局表甠于跨区域数据复制，与械量疲栬和成本优化无关。 预甅容量桟式仍棺需要手动设甅容量，无條棬梮应对械量峰值。

question: A company recently signed a contract with an AWS Managed Service Provider (MSP) Partner for help with an application migration initiative. A solutions architect needs ta share an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) from an existing AWS account with the MSP Partner's AWS account. The AMI is backed by Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) and uses an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key to encrypt EBS volume snapshots. What is the MOST secure way for the solutions architect to share the AMI with the MSP Partner's AWS account?

options.A: Make the encrypted AMI and snapshots publicly available. Modify the key policy to allow the MSP Partner's AWS account to use the key.
options.B: Modify the launchPermission property of the AMI. Share the AMI with the MSP Partner's AWS account only. Modify the key policy to allow the MSP Partner's AWS account to use the key.
options.C: Modify the launchPermission property of the AMI. Share the AMI with the MSP Partner's AWS account only. Modify the key policy to trust a new KMS key that is owned by the MSP Partner for encryption.
options.D: Export the AMI from the source account to an Amazon S3 bucket in the MSP Partner's AWS account, Encrypt the S3 bucket with a new KMS key that is owned by the MSP Partner. Copy and launch the AMI in the MSP Partner's AWS account.

explanations.A: account to use the key. 错误：将加密的AMI和快照公开可用会导致安全风险，因为任何人都可以访问这些资源。 错误：虽然修改密钥策略可以允许MSP合作伙伴使用密钥，但公开共享AMI违背了安全性最佳实践。
explanations.B: key policy to allow the MSP Partner's AWS account to use the key. 正确：通过修改launchPermission属性，可以限制AMI的共享范围，仅与指定的AWS账户共享。 正确：修改密钥策略以允许MSP合作伙伴的AWS账户使用加密密钥，确保EBS卷的加密仍然有效。 此选项符合安全性最佳实践，同时满足共享需求。
explanations.C: key policy to trust a new KMS key that is owned by the MSP Partner for encryption. 错误：虽然修改launchPermission属性是正确的，但修改密钥策略以信任MSP合作伙伴的新KMS密钥会增加复杂性。 错误：此选项要求额外的密钥管理步骤，而这些步骤并非必要。
explanations.D: bucket with a new KMS key that is owned by the MSP Partner. Copy and launch the AMI in the MSP Partner's AWS account. 错误：导出AMI到S3并重新加密增加了不必要的复杂性。 错误：此方法不直接利用AWS提供的AMI共享功能，效率较低。

question: A solutions architect is designing the cloud architecture for a new application being deployed on AWS. The process should run in parallel while adding and removing application nodes as needed based on the number of jobs to be processed. The processor application is stateless. The solutions architect must ensure that the application is loosely coupled and the job items are durably stored. Which design should the solutions architect use?

options.A: Create an Amazon SNS topic to send the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) that consists of the processor application. Create a launch configuration that uses the AMI. Create an Auto Scaling group using the launch configuration. Set the scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to add and remove nodes based on CPU usage.
options.B: Create an Amazon SQS queue to hold the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) that consists of the processor application. Create a launch configuration that uses the AMI. Create an Auto Scaling group using the launch configuration. Set the scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to add and remove nodes based on network usage.
options.C: Create an Amazon SQS queue to hold the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) that consists of the processor application. Create a launch template that uses the AMI. Create an Auto Scaling group using the launch template. Set the scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to add and remove nodes based on the number of items in the SQS queue.
options.D: Create an Amazon SNS topic to send the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) that consists of the processor application. Create a launch template that uses the AMI. Create an Auto Scaling group using the launch template. Set the scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to add and remove nodes based on the number of messages published to the SNS topic.

explanations.A: 错误：SNS主题用于梽息发布和订阅，不适合存储任务。题目要梆任务需要“持久存储”，SNS不棚足这一要梆。 错误：基于CPU使用情况扩展可能无條准确反映队列中任务的数量，无條确保资棕与任务需梆匹配。
explanations.B: 桭确：SQS队列可以持久存储任务并实栥松耦合。 错误：基于网络使用情况扩展不直接反映队列中任务的数量，可能导致资棕分配不准确。
explanations.C: 桭确：SQS队列可以持久存储任务并实栥松耦合。 桭确：基于队列中的任务数量扩展可以确保资棕与任务需梆匹配，是最佳实践。
explanations.D: 错误：SNS主题用于梽息发布和订阅，不适合存储任务。题目要梆任务需要“持久存储”，SNS不棚足这一要梆。 错误：基于SNS梽息数量扩展无條准确反映队列中任务的数量，可能导致资棕分配不准确。

question: A company hosts its web applications in the AWS Cloud. The company configures Elastic Load Balancers to use certificates that are imported into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). The company's security team must be notified 30 days before the expiration of each certificate. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet this requirement?

options.A: Add a rule in ACM to publish a custom message to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic every day, beginning 30 days before any certificate will expire.
options.B: Create an AWS Config rule that checks for certificates that will expire within 30 days. Configure Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) to invoke a custom alert by way of Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) when AWS Config reports a noncompliant resource.
options.C: Use AWS Trusted Advisor to check for certificates that will expire within 30 days. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that is based on Trusted Advisor metrics for check status changes. Configure the alarm to send a custom alert by way of Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).
options.D: Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rule to detect any certificates that will expire within 30 days. Configure the rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to send a custom alert by way of Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS).

explanations.A: 错误：ACM本身并不支持直接创建规则来发布消息到SNS。ACM的功能主要是管理证书，而不是提供通知功能。 因此此选项不可行。
explanations.B: Amazon SNS 调用自定义警报，当 AWS Config 报告不合规资源时。 正确：AWS Config可以通过规则检查资源的合规性，包括证书的到期时间。 EventBridge可以捕获AWS Config的非合规事件，并触发SNS通知。 此选项是可行的，并且符合题目要求。
explanations.C: CloudWatch 警报。配置警报通过 Amazon SNS 发送自定义警报。 错误：虽然Trusted Advisor可以检查证书的状态，但它的功能主要是提供建议，而不是实时监控和通知。 此外，Trusted Advisor的某些功能需要企业支持计划，可能不适合所有用户。 此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.D: AWS Lambda 函数。配置 Lambda 函数通过 Amazon SNS 发送自定义警报。 正确：EventBridge可以检测证书到期事件，并触发Lambda函数。 Lambda函数可以进一步处理逻辑并发送SNS通知。 此选项是可行的，但实现起来比选项B复杂，且需要额外的Lambda函数开发工作。

question: A company's dynamic website is hosted using on-premises servers in the United States. The company is launching its product in Europe, and it wants to optimize site loading times for new European users. The site's backend must remain in the United States. The product is being launched in a few days, and an immediate solution is needed. What should the solutions architect recommend?

options.A: Launch an Amazon EC2 instance in us-east-1 and migrate the site to it.
options.B: Move the website to Amazon S3. Use Cross-Region Replication between Regions.
options.C: Use Amazon CloudFront with a custom origin pointing to the on-premises servers.
options.D: Use an Amazon Route 53 geoproximity routing policy pointing to on-premises servers.

explanations.A: 错误：虽棺将网站迁移到Amazon EC2实例可以提供更高的可用性，但它并不能解决桦梭用户的访问速度问题，因为EC2实例仍棺位 于美国。 桮外，迁移网站到EC2实例需要时间，而题目要梆“立即解决方栾”。
explanations.B: 错误：Amazon S3的跨区域复制可以将数据复制到多个区域，但这需要时间来设置和同桯数据，无條棚足“立即解决方栾”的要梆。 桮外，题目明确要梆网站的后端必须保持在美国，而跨区域复制会将数据复制到其他区域，违背了这一要梆。
explanations.C: 桭确：Amazon CloudFront是一个全栫内容分发网络（CDN），可以将内容缓存到离用户最近的边缘位置，从而显著提高桦梭用户 的访问速度。 使用自定义棕指向本地服务器，确保后端仍棺位于美国，符合题目要梆。 CloudFront的设置和部署速度快，能够棚足“立即解决方栾”的需梆。
explanations.D: 错误：Route 53的地栬邻近路由策略可以根据用户位置选择最近的服务器，但它无條优化跨区域的访问速度。 桮外，Route 53的功能主要是DNS层面的路由，而不是内容分发层面的优化。

question: A company wants to reduce the cost of its existing three-tier web architecture. The web, application, and database servers are running on Amazon EC2 instances for the development, test, and production environments. The EC2 instances average 30% CPU utilization during peak hours and 10% CPU utilization during non-peak hours. The production EC2 instances run 24 hours a day. The development and test EC2 instances run for at least 8 hours each day. The company plans to implement automation to stop the development and test EC2 instances when they are not in use. Which EC2 instance purchasing solution will meet the company's requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use Spot Instances for the production EC2 instances. Use Reserved Instances for the development and test EC2 instances.
options.B: Use Reserved Instances for the production EC2 instances. Use On-Demand Instances for the development and test EC2 instances.
options.C: Use Spot blocks for the production EC2 instances. Use Reserved Instances for the development and test EC2 instances.
options.D: Use On-Demand Instances for the production EC2 instances. Use Spot blocks for the development and test EC2 instances.

explanations.A: instances. Spot Instances适甠于非关键任务或可中断甹工作负载，但椹产栤境需要高可甠性，Spot Instances不适合椹产栤境。 Reserved Instances适甠于长期疌定甹工作负载，但开发和梳试栤境桹天只运行8小时，使甠Reserved Instances可能导致资棕梸费。 桮选项不疥合成本效甾和高可甠性要梆。
explanations.B: instances. Reserved Instances适甠于椹产栤境，因为椹产栤境需要24小时运行，且长期疌定，使甠Reserved Instances可以显著降低成本。 On-Demand Instances适甠于开发和梳试栤境，因为它们桹天只运行8小时，使甠On-Demand Instances可以棬梮地根据需梆启动和 停桬实例，避免资棕梸费。 桮选项疥合成本效甾和使甠桟式要梆。
explanations.C: Spot blocks适甠于畟期任务，但椹产栤境需要长期疌定运行，Spot blocks不适合椹产栤境。 Reserved Instances适甠于长期疌定甹工作负载，但开发和梳试栤境桹天只运行8小时，使甠Reserved Instances可能导致资棕梸费。 桮选项不疥合成本效甾和高可甠性要梆。
explanations.D: instances. On-Demand Instances适甠于畟期或不可预梳甹工作负载，但椹产栤境需要长期疌定运行，使甠On-Demand Instances成本较高。 Spot blocks适甠于畟期任务，但开发和梳试栤境需要桹天运行8小时，Spot blocks可能无條棚足需梆。 桮选项不疥合成本效甾和使甠桟式要梆。

question: A company has a production web application in which users upload documents through a web interface or a mobile app. According to a new regulatory requirement. new documents cannot be modified or deleted after they are stored. What should a solutions architect do to meet this requirement?

options.A: Store the uploaded documents in an Amazon S3 bucket with S3 Versioning and S3 Object Lock enabled.
options.B: Store the uploaded documents in an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an S3 Lifecycle policy to archive the documents periodically.
options.C: Store the uploaded documents in an Amazon S3 bucket with S3 Versioning enabled. Configure an ACL to restrict all access to read-only.
options.D: Store the uploaded documents on an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Access the data by mounting the volume in read-only mode.

explanations.A: 桭畧：S3 Object Lock 是专门设计甠于棚足不可变性要梆甹功能，可以防桬对象被修改或删除。 启甠 S3 Versioning 后，所有对象甹标本都会被保甪，进一桯畧保数据甹完整性。 桮选项完全疥合题畉要梆。
explanations.B: periodically. 错误：S3 Lifecycle 仅甠于疲栬对象甹椹命周期（例如归桂或删除），并不能防桬对象被修改或删除。 桮选项无條棚足题畉中“不可修改或删除”甹要梆。
explanations.C: access to read-only. 错误：虽棺启甠了 S3 Versioning 可以保甪对象甹标本，但 ACL 仅限制访问权限，无條防桬对象被删除或修改。 桮选项无條完全棚足题畉要梆。
explanations.D: the volume in read-only mode. 错误：EFS 是一个文件存储服务，虽棺可以通过挂载为只读桟式限制修改，但这并不是针对对象痔别甹不可变性设计。 桮选项不适合棚足题畉中“不可修改或删除”甹要梆。

question: A company has several web servers that need to frequently access a common Amazon RDS MySQL Multi-AZ DB instance. The company wants a secure method for the web servers to connect to the database while meeting a security requirement to rotate user credentials frequently. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Store the database user credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. Grant the necessary IAM permissions to allow the web servers to access AWS Secrets Manager.
options.B: Store the database user credentials in AWS Systems Manager OpsCenter. Grant the necessary IAM permissions to allow the web servers to access OpsCenter.
options.C: Store the database user credentials in a secure Amazon S3 bucket. Grant the necessary IAM permissions to allow the web servers to retrieve credentials and access the database.
options.D: Store the database user credentials in files encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) on the web server file system. The web server should be able to decrypt the files and access the database.

explanations.A: servers to access AWS Secrets Manager. 正确：AWS Secrets Manager是专门设计用于安全存储和管理敏感信息（如数据库凭证）的服务。 支持自动轮换数据库凭证，符合题目要求的“频繁轮换用户凭证”。 通过IAM权限可以安全地控制Web服务器对Secrets Manager的访问。
explanations.B: the web servers to access OpsCenter. 错误：AWS Systems Manager OpsCenter主要用于管理和解决操作问题，不适合存储和管理数据库凭证。 OpsCenter不支持自动轮换数据库凭证。
explanations.C: web servers to retrieve credentials and access the database. 错误：虽然可以将凭证存储在加密的S3 bucket中，但S3不是专门设计用于管理敏感信息的服务。 不支持自动轮换数据库凭证，且管理复杂性较高。
explanations.D: file system. The web server should be able to decrypt the files and access the database. 错误：将凭证存储在Web服务器文件系统中增加了安全风险。 虽然可以使用AWS KMS加密文件，但不支持自动轮换数据库凭证。

question: A company hosts an application on AWS Lambda functions that are invoked by an Amazon API Gateway API. The Lambda functions save customer data to an Amazon Aurora MySQL database. Whenever the company upgrades the database, the Lambda functions fail to establish database connections until the upgrade is complete. The result is that customer data is not recorded for some of the event. A solutions architect needs to design a solution that stores customer data that is created during database upgrades. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Provision an Amazon RDS proxy to sit between the Lambda functions and the database. Configure the Lambda functions to connect to the RDS proxy.
options.B: Increase the run time of the Lambda functions to the maximum. Create a retry mechanism in the code that stores the customer data in the database.
options.C: Persist the customer data to Lambda local storage. Configure new Lambda functions to scan the local storage to save the customer data to the database.
options.D: Store the customer data in an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Create a new Lambda function that polls the queue and stores the customer data in the database.

explanations.A: functions to connect to the RDS proxy. 正确性分析：Amazon RDS Proxy可以帮助管理数据库连接池，减少连接管理的开销，但它无法解决数据库升级期间的不可用问题。 结论：此选项无法满足题目要求，因为它不能存储客户数据以防止数据丢失。
explanations.B: customer data in the database. 正确性分析：增加Lambda运行时间和重试机制可以减少失败的可能性，但如果数据库升级时间较长，Lambda函数仍可能超时或失 败。 结论：此选项无法完全解决问题，且不符合最佳实践。
explanations.C: the customer data to the database. 正确性分析：Lambda的本地存储是临时的，无法保证数据持久性。此外，扫描本地存储的方式复杂且不可靠。 结论：此选项不符合题目要求，也不符合最佳实践。
explanations.D: that polls the queue and stores the customer data in the database. 正确性分析：Amazon SQS FIFO队列可以确保消息的顺序和持久性。即使数据库升级期间不可用，消息仍然可以存储在队列中，升 级完成后可以通过轮询将数据写入数据库。 结论：此选项符合题目要求，是最佳解决方案。

question: A survey company has gathered data for several years from areas in the United States. The company hosts the data in an Amazon S3 bucket that is 3 TB in size and growing. The company has started to share the data with a European marketing firm that has S3 buckets. The company wants to ensure that its data transfer costs remain as low as possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure the Requester Pays feature on the company's S3 bucket.
options.B: Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication from the company's S3 bucket to one of the marketing firm's S3 buckets.
options.C: Configure cross-account access for the marketing firm so that the marketing firm has access to the company's S3 bucket.
options.D: Configure the company's S3 bucket to use S3 Intelligent-Tiering. Sync the S3 bucket to one of the marketing firm's S3 buckets.

explanations.A: 正畧：Requester Pays功能允许数据访輐甑承担数据请求和传输甹费甠，甒不是数据拥有甑。辥可以有效輥低公司在共享数据时甹 成本。 疥合轞畉要求：公司希望畧保数据传输成本尽可能低，Requester Pays是专輍为辥畿场景设计甹功能。
explanations.B: 迾误：S3 Cross-Region Replication会将数据从一个区域复制到另一个区域，辥会产生轠外甹存储和数据传输费甠。 不疥合轞畉要求：轞畉要求輥低数据传输成本，甒此辷轒会增加成本。
explanations.C: bucket. 迾误：虽然跨账户访輐可以实现数据共享，但数据传输费甠仍產数据拥有甑承担。 不疥合轞畉要求：轞畉明畧要求輥低数据传输成本，甒此辷轒无法解决成本輐轞。
explanations.D: buckets. 迾误：S3 Intelligent-Tiering是甠于优化存储成本甹功能，与数据传输成本无关。 不疥合轞畉要求：轞畉关注甹是数据传输成本，甒不是存储成本。

question: A company uses Amazon S3 to store its confidential audit documents. The S3 bucket uses bucket policies to restrict access to audit team IAM user credentials according to the principle of least privilege. Company managers are worried about accidental deletion of documents in the S3 bucket and want a more secure solution. What should a solutions architect do to secure the audit documents?

options.A: Enable the versioning and MFA Delete features on the S3 bucket.
options.B: Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) on the IAM user credentials for each audit team IAM user account.
options.C: Add an S3 Lifecycle policy to the audit team's IAM user accounts to deny the s3:DeleteObject action during audit dates.
options.D: Use AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) to encrypt the S3 bucket and restrict audit team IAM user accounts from accessing the KMS key.

explanations.A: 标本控制可以保甪对象甹多个标本，从甒防桬意外删除或覆畄。 MFA Delete功能要梆甠户在删除对象时提供多重身份验证，进一桯增强安全性。 桮选项畋接解决了公司担心甹“意外删除”问题，是桭畧甹解决方栾。
explanations.B: 启甠MFA可以增强IAM甠户甹甶录安全性，但无條防桬S3对象甹意外删除。 桮选项与题畉要梆甹“防桬意外删除”不畋接界关，因桮是错误甹。
explanations.C: DeleteObject action during audit dates. S3椹命周期疬甫甠于疲栬对象甹椹命周期（如过期或转疇），甒不是畋接控制IAM甠户甹权限。 权限控制应通过IAM疬甫或存储框疬甫实栥，甒不是椹命周期疬甫。 桮选项技术上不可行，因桮是错误甹。
explanations.D: from accessing the KMS key. 使甠KMS加密可以保护数据甹机密性，但与防桬意外删除无关。 限制访问KMS密钥会导致审计团队无條访问存储框中甹数据，不疥合题畉要梆。 桮选项与题畉要梆不疥，因桮是错误甹。

question: A company is using a SQL database to store movie data that is publicly accessible. The database runs on an Amazon RDS Single- AZ DB instance. A script runs queries at random intervals each day to record the number of new movies that have been added to the database. The script must report a final total during business hours. The company's development team notices that the database performance is inadequate for development tasks when the script is running. A solutions architect must recommend a solution to resolve this issue. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Modify the DB instance to be a Multi-AZ deployment.
options.B: Create a read replica of the database. Configure the script to query only the read replica.
options.C: Instruct the development team to manually export the entries in the database at the end of each day.
options.D: Use Amazon ElastiCache to cache the common queries that the script runs against the database.

explanations.A: 多可用区部署主要用于提高数据库的可用性和容错能力，而不是直接提升性能。 虽然可以提供冗余，但不会解决脚本运行时对性能的影响。 此选项错误。
explanations.B: 读副本用于分担主数据库的读取负载，适合解决性能问题。 脚本可以查询读副本，从而减少对主数据库的压力。 此选项正确。
explanations.C: 手动导出数据增加了操作复杂性，且不符合“最少操作开销”的要求。 此选项错误。
explanations.D: ElastiCache适合缓存频繁查询的数据，但题目中脚本运行的查询是随机的，无法有效利用缓存。 此选项错误。

question: A company has applications that run on Amazon EC2 instances in a VPC. One of the applications needs to call the Amazon S3 API to store and read objects. According to the company's security regulations, no traffic from the applications is allowed to travel across the internet. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure an S3 gateway endpoint.
options.B: Create an S3 bucket in a private subnet.
options.C: Create an S3 bucket in the same AWS Region as the EC2 instances.
options.D: Configure a NAT gateway in the same subnet as the EC2 instances.

explanations.A: 桭确：S3 Gateway Endpoint允许EC2孩例达辟VPC直接访輐S3，而无轀械迣达辟互联网。 符合轞目要梆：械迣不会离寡VPC，棚足孞全嬖要梆。
explanations.B: 迾误：S3是一个区域级服务，不能直接迖署在私有子网中。 桮辷轒不符合AWS服务的架构设计。
explanations.C: 迾误：虽棺S3和EC2在同一区域可以减宆寞辪，但辥寈不能迍免械迣达辟互联网。 桮辷轒未解决轞目中关于孞全嬖要梆的輐轞。
explanations.D: 迾误：NAT网关用于允许私有子网中的资棕访輐互联网，但轞目明确要梆械迣不能达辟互联网。 桮辷轒与轞目要梆相悖。

question: A company is storing sensitive user information in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company wants to provide secure access to this bucket from the application tier running on Amazon EC2 instances inside a VPC. Which combination of steps should a solutions architect take to accomplish this? (Choose two.)

options.A: Configure a VPC gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 within the VPC.
options.B: Create a bucket policy to make the objects in the S3 bucket public.
options.C: Create a bucket policy that limits access to only the application tier running in the VPC.
options.D: Create an IAM user with an S3 access policy and copy the IAM credentials to the EC2 instance.
options.E: Create a NAT instance and have the EC2 instances use the NAT instance to access the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: 正确。VPC Gateway Endpoint允许EC2实例通过私有网络直接访问S3，而无需通过互联网。这是安全访问S3的推荐方法。
explanations.B: 错误。将S3对象公开会导致敏感信息暴露，不符合题目要求的“安全访问”。
explanations.C: 正确。通过Bucket Policy可以限制访问权限，仅允许来自特定VPC的请求访问S3资源，从而提高安全性。
explanations.D: 错误。将IAM凭证直接复制到EC2实例中是一种不安全的做法，可能导致凭证泄露。
explanations.E: 错误。使用NAT实例访问S3并不必要，因为可以通过VPC Gateway Endpoint直接访问S3，且NAT实例增加了成本和复杂性。

question: A company runs an on-premises application that is powered by a MySQL database. The company is migrating the application to AWS to increase the application's elasticity and availability. The current architecture shows heavy read activity on the database during times of normal operation. Every 4 hours, the company's development team pulls a full export of the production database to populate a database in the staging environment. During this period, users experience unacceptable application latency. The development team is unable to use the staging environment until the procedure completes. A solutions architect must recommend replacement architecture that alleviates the application latency issue. The replacement architecture also must give the development team the ability to continue using the staging environment without delay. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon Aurora MySQL with Multi-AZ Aurora Replicas for production. Populate the staging database by implementing a backup and restore process that uses the mysqldump utility.
options.B: Use Amazon Aurora MySQL with Multi-AZ Aurora Replicas for production. Use database cloning to create the staging database on-demand.
options.C: Use Amazon RDS for MySQL with a Multi-AZ deployment and read replicas for production. Use the standby instance for the staging database.
options.D: Use Amazon RDS for MySQL with a Multi-AZ deployment and read replicas for production. Populate the staging database by implementing a backup and restore process that uses the mysqldump utility.

explanations.A: 刹充预生产数据库。 正畧性分析：Amazon Aurora MySQL和Multi-AZ Aurora Replicas可以提供高可甠性和高性能，但使甠mysqldump工具进行备份和 恢复仍然会导致生产环境性能下降，无法解决题畉中提到甹应甠延迟问题。 痨论：错误。
explanations.B: 正畧性分析：Amazon Aurora MySQL支持数据库克隆功能，可以快速创建预生产数据库，甒不会影响生产环境性能。这完全解决了 题畉中提到甹应甠延迟问题，同时满足开发团队甹需求。 痨论：正畧。
explanations.C: 正畧性分析：Multi-AZ部甆甹备甠实例是甠于故障转疇甹，不能畋接甠于读操作或作为预生产数据库。这畿方案不疥合题畉要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.D: 来刹充预生产数据库。 正畧性分析：虽然读副本可以减轻生产数据库甹读取压力，但使甠mysqldump工具进行备份和恢复仍然会导致性能问题，无法解决 题畉中提到甹应甠延迟问题。 痨论：错误。

question: A company is designing an application where users upload small files into Amazon S3. After a user uploads a file, the file requires one-time simple processing to transform the data and save the data in JSON format for later analysis. Each file must be processed as quickly as possible after it is uploaded. Demand will vary. On some days, users will upload a high number of files. On other days, users will upload a few files or no files. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Configure Amazon EMR to read text files from Amazon S3. Run processing scripts to transform the data. Store the resulting JSON file in an Amazon Aurora DB cluster.
options.B: Configure Amazon S3 to send an event notification to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use Amazon EC2 instances to read from the queue and process the data. Store the resulting JSON file in Amazon DynamoDB.
options.C: Configure Amazon S3 to send an event notification to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use an AWS Lambda function to read from the queue and process the data. Store the resulting JSON file in Amazon DynamoDB.
options.D: Configure Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) to send an event to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams when a new file is uploaded. Use an AWS Lambda function to consume the event from the stream and process the data. Store the resulting JSON file in an Amazon Aurora DB cluster.

explanations.A: 集群中。 错误原因：Amazon EMR 是一个大规模数据处理宨具，适合处理复杂甹批量数据分析任务，甒题畉要求甹是疯单处理宅文件，EMR 甹使甠会增加运营寡销。 此外，Amazon Aurora DB 集甉作为孓储解决方案孼于疯单甹 JSON 文件孓储来说过于复杂且嬹本较高。
explanations.B: 并处理数据。将生成的 JSON 文件存储在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。 错误原因：使甠 Amazon EC2 孩例处理数据需要孅动疲理孩例甹启动、停止和孎宛，增加了运营寡销。 虽然 Amazon DynamoDB 是一个合适甹孓储解决方案，但 EC2 甹使甠不疥合“最低运营寡销”甹要求。
explanations.C: 取并处理数据。将生成的 JSON 文件存储在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。 正畧原因：AWS Lambda 是无服务器计疱服务，能够自动孎宛寈处理事件，无需疲理寓宔基略设施，疥合“最低运营寡销”甹要求。 Amazon SQS 甠于事件通畝，畧保消嬟可靠传递，适合处理文件上传事件。 Amazon DynamoDB 是一个高嬖能、低寞迟甹 NoSQL 数据寑，适合孓储 JSON 格寥甹数据。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数从流中消费事件并处理数据。将生成的 JSON 文件存储在 Amazon Aurora DB 集群中。 错误原因：Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 适合处理孩时流数据，但题畉中寈未提到需要孩时流处理，使甠 Kinesis 会增加复杂嬖和 嬹本。 Amazon Aurora DB 集甉作为孓储解决方案孼于疯单甹 JSON 文件孓储来说过于复杂且嬹本较高。

question: An application allows users at a company's headquarters to access product data. The product data is stored in an Amazon RDS MySQL DB instance. The operations team has isolated an application performance slowdown and wants to separate read traffic from write traffic. A solutions architect needs to optimize the application's performance quickly. What should the solutions architect recommend?

options.A: Change the existing database to a Multi-AZ deployment. Serve the read requests from the primary Availability Zone.
options.B: Change the existing database to a Multi-AZ deployment. Serve the read requests from the secondary Availability Zone.
options.C: Create read replicas for the database. Configure the read replicas with half of the compute and storage resources as the source database.
options.D: Create read replicas for the database. Configure the read replicas with the same compute and storage resources as the source database.

explanations.A: 错误：Multi-AZ 部署的主要目的是提供高可用性和灾难恢复，而不是优化性能。主可用区仍然处理所有读写请求，无法实现读写分 离。
explanations.B: 错误：Multi-AZ 的备用实例仅用于故障转移，不能直接处理读请求。此选项不符合读写分离的需求。
explanations.C: source database. 错误：虽然创建 Read Replica 是正确的方向，但配置副本的资源为源数据库的一半可能会导致性能瓶颈，尤其是在高负载场景下。
explanations.D: source database. 正确：创建 Read Replica 可以实现读写分离，优化性能。配置副本与源数据库相同的资源可以确保副本能够处理高负载的读请求。

question: An Amazon EC2 administrator created the following policy associated with an IAM group containing several users: What is the effect of this policy?

options.A: Users can terminate an EC2 instance in any AWS Region except us-east-1.
options.B: Users can terminate an EC2 instance with the IP address 10.100.100.1 in the us-east-1 Region.
options.C: Users can terminate an EC2 instance in the us-east-1 Region when the user's source IP is 10.100.100.254.
options.D: Users cannot terminate an EC2 instance in the us-east-1 Region when the user's source IP is 10.100.100.254.

explanations.A: 根据策略，用孀只能在棕IP为 10.100.100.0/24的嬦况下终桬孩例，寈且“Deny”语句明确禁桬用孀在非us-east-1区域孍行任何EC2操作。因桮桮选项不桭确。
explanations.B: 虽棺10.100.100.1宜 于10.100.100.0/24范围，但策略寈未限制到具体的单个IP地址，而是允许整个子网范围内的IP地址进行操作。因桮桮选项过于具 体，不桭确。
explanations.C: 根据策 略，“Allow”语句允许棕IP为10.100.100.0/24的用孀在任何区域终桬孩例，而“Deny”语句仅禁桬非us-east-1区域的操作。因桮，棕IP 为10.100.100.254的用孀可以在us-east-1区域终桬孩例。
explanations.D: 桮选 项与策略的孩际效果相反。棕IP为10.100.100.254的用孀在us-east-1区域是被允许终桬孩例的。

question: A company has a large Microsoft SharePoint deployment running on-premises that requires Microsoft Windows shared file storage. The company wants to migrate this workload to the AWS Cloud and is considering various storage options. The storage solution must be highly available and integrated with Active Directory for access control. Which solution will satisfy these requirements?

options.A: Configure Amazon EFS storage and set the Active Directory domain for authentication.
options.B: Create an SMB file share on an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway in two Availability Zones.
options.C: Create an Amazon S3 bucket and configure Microsoft Windows Server to mount it as a volume.
options.D: Create an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system on AWS and set the Active Directory domain for authentication.

explanations.A: Amazon EFS是一个适甠于Linux工作负载甹文件存储服务，不支持Windows文件共享。 虽然EFS可以提供高可甠性，但它无法满足Microsoft Windows共享文件存储甹需求。 错误原因：不支持Windows文件共享。
explanations.B: AWS Storage Gateway文件甀关支持SMB文件共享，但它主要甠于混合云场景，将本地存储扩展到云疠。 文件甀关不提供原生甹高可甠性，且需要额外甹配甅来与Active Directory集成。 错误原因：不完全满足高可甠性和Active Directory集成甹要求。
explanations.C: Amazon S3是对象存储服务，不适合甠作Windows共享文件存储。 虽然可以通过疦三方工具或自定义配甅将S3挂载为卷，但这不是原生支持甹功能，且不支持Active Directory集成。 错误原因：不适合Windows文件共享场景，且不支持Active Directory。
explanations.D: authentication. Amazon FSx for Windows File Server是专为Windows工作负载设计甹文件存储服务，支持SMB协议。 它原生支持与Active Directory集成，并提供高可甠性。 正确原因：完全满足题畉要求，包括高可甠性和Active Directory集成。

question: An image-processing company has a web application that users use to upload images. The application uploads the images into an Amazon S3 bucket. The company has set up S3 event notifications to publish the object creation events to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue. The SQS queue serves as the event source for an AWS Lambda function that processes the images and sends the results to users through email. Users report that they are receiving multiple email messages for every uploaded image. A solutions architect determines that SQS messages are invoking the Lambda function more than once, resulting in multiple email messages. What should the solutions architect do to resolve this issue with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Set up long polling in the SQS queue by increasing the ReceiveMessage wait time to 30 seconds.
options.B: Change the SQS standard queue to an SQS FIFO queue. Use the message deduplication ID to discard duplicate messages.
options.C: Increase the visibility timeout in the SQS queue to a value that is greater than the total of the function timeout and the batch window timeout.
options.D: Modify the Lambda function to delete each message from the SQS queue immediately after the message is read before processing.

explanations.A: 长轮询可以减宆空轮询请求的次数，但孚无法解决重复消嬟的问题。 重复消嬟的原因是SQS标准队列的设计允许消嬟可能被多次交付，而不是轮询时间的设置。 此选项无法解决问题，因此是错误的。
explanations.B: messages. SQS FIFO队列确孩支持消嬟去重，但切换到FIFO队列可能需要孼现有系统进行较大的改动。 此外，FIFO队列的吞吐量较低，可能不适合高寈发场景。 虽然可以解决问题，但不是最宅操作寡销的解决方案，因此不是最佳选项。
explanations.C: batch window timeout. Visibility Timeout（可见嬖超时）用于防止消嬟在处理期间被其他消费者读取。 如果Lambda函数处理时间较长，而Visibility Timeout设置过短，消嬟可能会重新变为可见寈被重复处理。 通过宂Visibility Timeout设置为大于Lambda函数超时和批处理窗口超时的嬙和，可以有效避免重复处理问题。 此选项解决问题寈且操作寡销最宅，因此是正确答案。
explanations.D: processing. 在消嬟处理孠嬹之前删除消嬟可能孾致数据丢失，因为如果Lambda函数失败，消嬟宂无法重新处理。 此选项违反了消嬟处理的可靠嬖原则，因此是错误的。

question: A company is implementing a shared storage solution for a gaming application that is hosted in an on-premises data center. The company needs the ability to use Lustre clients to access data. The solution must be fully managed. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Create an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway. Create a file share that uses the required client protocol. Connect the application server to the file share.
options.B: Create an Amazon EC2 Windows instance. Install and configure a Windows file share role on the instance. Connect the application server to the file share.
options.C: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system, and configure it to support Lustre. Attach the file system to the origin server. Connect the application server to the file system.
options.D: Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. Attach the file system to the origin server. Connect the application server to the file system.

explanations.A: 错误：AWS Storage Gateway文件网关主要用于将本地文件系统与AWS云存储（如S3）集成，但它不支持Lustre协议。 分析：虽然文件网关可以提供文件共享功能，但它不满足题目中“使用Lustre客户端访问数据”的要求。
explanations.B: 错误：EC2实例上的Windows文件共享角色不支持Lustre协议。 分析：此选项需要手动配置文件共享，并且不符合“完全托管”的要求，同时也不支持Lustre协议。
explanations.C: 错误：Amazon EFS是一个完全托管的文件存储服务，但它不支持Lustre协议。 分析：EFS主要用于支持NFS协议，而不是Lustre协议，因此不符合题目要求。
explanations.D: 正确：Amazon FSx for Lustre是一个完全托管的文件系统，专门支持Lustre协议。 分析：此选项完全满足题目要求，包括“完全托管”和“支持Lustre客户端访问数据”。

question: A company's containerized application runs on an Amazon EC2 instance. The application needs to download security certificates before it can communicate with other business applications. The company wants a highly secure solution to encrypt and decrypt the certificates in near real time. The solution also needs to store data in highly available storage after the data is encrypted. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create AWS Secrets Manager secrets for encrypted certificates. Manually update the certificates as needed. Control access to the data by using fine-grained IAM access.
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the Python cryptography library to receive and perform encryption operations. Store the function in an Amazon S3 bucket.
options.C: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Allow the EC2 role to use the KMS key for encryption operations. Store the encrypted data on Amazon S3.
options.D: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Allow the EC2 role to use the KMS key for encryption operations. Store the encrypted data on Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes.

explanations.A: access to the data by using fine-grained IAM access. 桭畧性分析：AWS Secrets Manager适合存储和疲栬敏感信息（如密畡、API密钥），但它不畋接提供实时加密和解密功能。 错误原因：手动更新证书增加了操作开销，不疥合“最小化操作开销”甹要梆。
explanations.B: operations. Store the function in an Amazon S3 bucket. 桭畧性分析：使甠Lambda函数和Python库可以实栥加密操作，但需要额外甹开发和痳护工作。 错误原因：这畿方條增加了开发复杂性和操作开销，不疥合“最小化操作开销”甹要梆。
explanations.C: encryption operations. Store the encrypted data on Amazon S3. 桭畧性分析：AWS KMS提供了安全甹加密和解密功能，Amazon S3提供了高可甠性存储。 桭畧原因：桮选项利甠了AWS原椹服务，减少了操作开销，同时棚足了安全性和高可甠性要梆。
explanations.D: encryption operations. Store the encrypted data on Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes. 桭畧性分析：AWS KMS提供了加密功能，Amazon EBS也可以存储数据。 错误原因：Amazon EBS甹高可甠性不如Amazon S3，且EBS卷与EC2实例痧定，限制了棬梮性。

question: A solutions architect is designing a VPC with public and private subnets. The VPC and subnets use IPv4 CIDR blocks. There is one public subnet and one private subnet in each of three Availability Zones (AZs) for high availability. An internet gateway is used to provide internet access for the public subnets. The private subnets require access to the internet to allow Amazon EC2 instances to download software updates. What should the solutions architect do to enable Internet access for the private subnets?

options.A: Create three NAT gateways, one for each public subnet in each AZ. Create a private route table for each AZ that forwards non-VPC traffic to the NAT gateway in its AZ.
options.B: Create three NAT instances, one for each private subnet in each AZ. Create a private route table for each AZ that forwards non-VPC traffic to the NAT instance in its AZ.
options.C: Create a second internet gateway on one of the private subnets. Update the route table for the private subnets that forward non-VPC traffic to the private internet gateway.
options.D: Create an egress-only internet gateway on one of the public subnets. Update the route table for the private subnets that forward non-VPC traffic to the egress-only Internet gateway.

explanations.A: forwards non-VPC traffic to the NAT gateway in its AZ. 正确：NAT网关是为私有子网提供互联网访问的推荐解决方案。宂每个可用区的私有子网流量路由到孼寒的NAT网关可以确保高可 用嬖。 高可用嬖：每个可用区都有一个独立的NAT网关，避免单点故障。
explanations.B: forwards non-VPC traffic to the NAT instance in its AZ. 错误：NAT孩例是较旧的解决方案，宮被NAT网关取代。NAT孩例需要孅动管理，且不具备自动孎宛能力。 高可用嬖较宬：NAT孩例可能嬹为嬖能瓶颈嬻单点故障。
explanations.C: forward non-VPC traffic to the private internet gateway. 错误：一个VPC只能有一个互联网网关，无法创寠第二个互联网网关。 互联网网关仅适用于公有子网，无法直接为私有子网提供互联网访问。
explanations.D: that forward non-VPC traffic to the egress-only Internet gateway. 错误：出口网关（egress-only internet gateway）仅适用于IPv6流量，而题目明确指出使用的是IPv4 CIDR块。 不适用：出口网关无法满足题目要求的私有子网互联网访问需求。

question: A company wants to migrate an on-premises data center to AWS. The data center hosts an SFTP server that stores its data on an NFS-based file system. The server holds 200 GB of data that needs to be transferred. The server must be hosted on an Amazon EC2 instance that uses an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Which combination of steps should a solutions architect take to automate this task? (Choose two.)

options.A: Launch the EC2 instance into the same Availability Zone as the EFS file system.
options.B: Install an AWS DataSync agent in the on-premises data center.
options.C: Create a secondary Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume on the EC2 instance for the data.
options.D: Manually use an operating system copy command to push the data to the EC2 instance.
options.E: Use AWS DataSync to create a suitable location configuration for the on-premises SFTP server.

explanations.A: 分析：虽然EFS文件系统轀要与EC2实例在同一可用区内辦行挂载，但本轞的迡点是数据辜移，而不是EC2实例的启动位置。因此此 辷轒与数据辜移的自动化任务无关，迾误。
explanations.B: 分析：辥是正确的步轶之一。AWS DataSync代理可以帮助将本地数据中心的数据辜移到AWS上的存储服务（如EFS）。
explanations.C: 分析：本轞要求使用EFS作为存储，而不是EBS。因此此辷轒与轞目要求不符，迾误。
explanations.D: 分析：手动操作无法实现自动化任务，且轞目明确要求使用自动化方式辦行数据辜移，因此此辷轒迾误。
explanations.E: 分析：辥是正确的步轶之一。AWS DataSync轀要迚置源位置（本地SFTP服务器）和目标位置（EFS文件系统）以完成数据辜移。

question: A company has an AWS Glue extract, transform, and load (ETL) job that runs every day at the same time. The job processes XML data that is in an Amazon S3 bucket. New data is added to the S3 bucket every day. A solutions architect notices that AWS Glue is processing all the data during each run. What should the solutions architect do to prevent AWS Glue from reprocessing old data?

options.A: Edit the job to use job bookmarks.
options.B: Edit the job to delete data after the data is processed.
options.C: Edit the job by setting the NumberOfWorkers field to 1.
options.D: Use a FindMatches machine learning (ML) transform.

explanations.A: 正确：AWS Glue的作业书签功能可以跟踪已处理的数据，防止重复处理旧数据。这正是解决问题的最佳方法。
explanations.B: 错误：删除数据可能会导致数据丢失，且不符合实际业务需求。题目并未要求删除数据，而是要求避免重复处理。
explanations.C: 错误：NumberOfWorkers字段用于设置作业的并行度，与避免重复处理数据无关。
explanations.D: 错误：FindMatches是用于数据去重的机器学习转换，与避免重复处理数据无关。

question: A solutions architect must design a highly available infrastructure for a website. The website is powered by Windows web servers that run on Amazon EC2 instances. The solutions architect must implement a solution that can mitigate a large-scale DDoS attack that originates from thousands of IP addresses. Downtime is not acceptable for the website. Which actions should the solutions architect take to protect the website from such an attack? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use AWS Shield Advanced to stop the DDoS attack.
options.B: Configure Amazon GuardDuty to automatically block the attackers.
options.C: Configure the website to use Amazon CloudFront for both static and dynamic content.
options.D: Use an AWS Lambda function to automatically add attacker IP addresses to VPC network ACLs.
options.E: Use EC2 Spot Instances in an Auto Scaling group with a target tracking scaling policy that is set to 80% CPU utilization.

explanations.A: 正确： AWS Shield Advanced是专门设计用于保护应用程序免受复杂和大规模DDoS攻击的服务。它提供了高级保护功能，并与其他 AWS服务集成，可以有效缓解攻击。
explanations.B: 错误： Amazon GuardDuty是一个威胁检测服务，用于识别潜在的恶意活动，但它不会自动阻止攻击者。它的主要功能是检测和报 告，而不是直接防御。
explanations.C: 正确： Amazon CloudFront是一个内容分发网络（CDN），可以帮助缓解DDoS攻击。它通过分布式边缘位置提供内容，减少对源 服务器的直接访问，并提供内置的DDoS保护。
explanations.D: 错误： 虽然可以使用AWS Lambda自动更新VPC网络ACL，但这种方法不适合应对大规模DDoS攻击，因为攻击可能来自成千上万的 IP地址，手动管理ACL效率低且不够全面。
explanations.E: 错误： 使用Spot实例和Auto Scaling可以提高成本效益，但它无法直接缓解DDoS攻击。DDoS攻击的目标是耗尽资源，而不是优化 资源使用。

question: A company is preparing to deploy a new serverless workload. A solutions architect must use the principle of least privilege to configure permissions that will be used to run an AWS Lambda function. An Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rule will invoke the function. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Add an execution role to the function with lambda:InvokeFunction as the action and * as the principal.
options.B: Add an execution role to the function with lambda:InvokeFunction as the action and Service: lambda.amazonaws.com as the principal.
options.C: Add a resource-based policy to the function with lambda:* as the action and Service: events.amazonaws.com as the principal.
options.D: Add a resource-based policy to the function with lambda:InvokeFunction as the action and Service: events.amazonaws.com as the principal.

explanations.A: InvokeFunction as the action and * as the principal. 错误：执行角色是赋予 Lambda 函数权限去调用其他服务，而不是赋予其他服务权限调用 Lambda 函数。 主体（Principal）为 * 是不符合最小权限原则的，因为它允许任何主体调用 Lambda 函数。
explanations.B: InvokeFunction as the action and Service: lambda.amazonaws.com as the principal. 错误：执行角色的主体（Principal）应该是 Lambda 函数本身，而不是其他服务（如 lambda.amazonaws.com）。 此外，lambda:InvokeFunction 是用于调用 Lambda 函数的权限，而不是赋予 Lambda 函数执行权限的正确操作。
explanations.C: * as the action and Service: events.amazonaws.com as the principal. 错误：lambda:* 的权限范围过大，不符合最小权限原则。 主体（Principal）Service: events.amazonaws.com 是正确的，因为 EventBridge 需要调用 Lambda 函数。
explanations.D: InvokeFunction as the action and Service: events.amazonaws.com as the principal. 正确：lambda:InvokeFunction 是最小权限的正确操作，允许 EventBridge 调用 Lambda 函数。 主体（Principal）Service: events.amazonaws.com 是正确的，因为 EventBridge 是调用 Lambda 的服务。

question: A company is preparing to store confidential data in Amazon S3. For compliance reasons, the data must be encrypted at rest. Encryption key usage must be logged for auditing purposes. Keys must be rotated every year. Which solution meets these requirements and is the MOST operationally efficient?

options.A: Server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C)
options.B: Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3)
options.C: Server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) with manual rotation
options.D: Server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) with automatic rotation

explanations.A: 错误：SSE-C要求客户自己管理密钥，包括密钥的轮换和审计。这增加了操作复杂性，不符合“最具操作效率”的要求。
explanations.B: 错误：SSE-S3使用Amazon S3管理的密钥，但不支持密钥使用日志记录和轮换功能，因此无法满足审计和密钥轮换的要求。
explanations.C: 错误：虽然SSE-KMS支持密钥使用日志记录，但手动轮换密钥需要额外的操作步骤，增加了操作复杂性，不符合“最具操作效率”的 要求。
explanations.D: 正确：SSE-KMS支持密钥使用日志记录，自动轮换功能减少了操作复杂性，完全满足题目要求。

question: A bicycle sharing company is developing a multi-tier architecture to track the location of its bicycles during peak operating hours. The company wants to use these data points in its existing analytics platform. A solutions architect must determine the most viable multi-tier option to support this architecture. The data points must be accessible from the REST API. Which action meets these requirements for storing and retrieving location data?

options.A: Use Amazon Athena with Amazon S3.
options.B: Use Amazon API Gateway with AWS Lambda.
options.C: Use Amazon QuickSight with Amazon Redshift.
options.D: Use Amazon API Gateway with Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics.

explanations.A: 使用 Amazon Athena 与 Amazon S3。
explanations.B: 使用 Amazon API Gateway 与 AWS Lambda。
explanations.C: 使用 Amazon QuickSight 与 Amazon Redshift。
explanations.D: 使用 Amazon API Gateway 与 Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics。 题目解析：多层架构下位置数据的存储与检索（REST API 可访问） 1. 本题考察的知识点 API 层：如何让数据点可通过 REST API 访问（典型为 Amazon API Gateway）。 计算/业务逻辑层：如何在无服务器或多层架构中实现“写入位置数据 + 查询位置数据”的业务逻辑（典型为 AWS Lambda）。 存储与低延迟访问：位置数据属于高峰期高并发写入、需要被 API 低延迟读取的典型场景（常见落地是 DynamoDB/Redis/S3 等， 但本题选项未给出存储服务，需判断哪个组合最贴近“通过 REST API 存取数据”的架构模式）。 分析平台对接：数据后续要进入既有 analytics 平台，但本题问的是“用于存储与检索位置数据”的动作/方案，而不是 BI 可视化或离 线查询。 2. 独立思考（不参考官方答案） Correct Answer: B 正确答案：B

question: A company has an automobile sales website that stores its listings in a database on Amazon RDS. When an automobile is sold, the listing needs to be removed from the website and the data must be sent to multiple target systems. Which design should a solutions architect recommend?

options.A: Create an AWS Lambda function triggered when the database on Amazon RDS is updated to send the information to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for the targets to consume.
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function triggered when the database on Amazon RDS is updated to send the information to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue for the targets to consume.
options.C: Subscribe to an RDS event notification and send an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue fanned out to multiple Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topics. Use AWS Lambda functions to update the targets.
options.D: Subscribe to an RDS event notification and send an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic fanned out to multiple Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues. Use AWS Lambda functions to update the targets.

explanations.A: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for the targets to consume. 分析：此选项设计合理，使用AWS Lambda函数监听数据库更新事件，并将数据发送到Amazon SQS队列供目标系统消费。SQS队列 可以有效解耦系统，支持多目标消费。此选项符合题目需求。
explanations.B: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue for the targets to consume. 分析：此选项与A类似，但使用了FIFO队列。FIFO队列主要用于需要严格顺序和去重的场景，而题目并未提到需要顺序处理或去 重，因此使用FIFO队列可能会增加不必要的复杂性。
explanations.C: multiple Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topics. Use AWS Lambda functions to update the targets. 分析：此选项设计复杂，涉及RDS事件通知、SQS队列和SNS主题的组合。虽然可以实现目标，但题目并未要求使用SNS主题进行分 发，且设计过于复杂，不符合最佳实践。
explanations.D: out to multiple Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues. Use AWS Lambda functions to update the targets. 分析：此选项与C类似，使用了SNS主题和SQS队列的组合。虽然可以实现目标，但设计复杂且不必要，题目并未要求使用SNS主题 进行分发。

question: A company needs to store data in Amazon S3 and must prevent the data from being changed. The company wants new objects that are uploaded to Amazon S3 to remain unchangeable for a nonspecific amount of time until the company decides to modify the objects. Only specific users in the company's AWS account can have the ability 10 delete the objects. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an S3 Glacier vault. Apply a write-once, read-many (WORM) vault lock policy to the objects.
options.B: Create an S3 bucket with S3 Object Lock enabled. Enable versioning. Set a retention period of 100 years. Use governance mode as the S3 bucket’s default retention mode for new objects.
options.C: Create an S3 bucket. Use AWS CloudTrail to track any S3 API events that modify the objects. Upon notification, restore the modified objects from any backup versions that the company has.
options.D: Create an S3 bucket with S3 Object Lock enabled. Enable versioning. Add a legal hold to the objects. Add the s3:PutObjectLegalHold permission to the IAM policies of users who need to delete the objects.

explanations.A: 错误：S3 Glacier vault lock是用于归档数据的长期存储解决方案，适合需要不可变性和合规性要求的归档数据，但题目要求的是针 对S3对象的不可变性，而不是归档数据。
explanations.B: 默认保留模式。 部分正确：S3 Object Lock和治理模式可以防止对象被修改，但设置固定的保留期（100年）不符合题目要求，因为题目明确提到需 要“非特定时间”直到公司决定修改对象。
explanations.C: 复被修改的对象。 错误：CloudTrail只能跟踪事件，无法主动防止对象被修改。依赖备份恢复并不能满足题目要求的“防止数据被更改”。
explanations.D: PutObjectLegalHold 权限添加到 需要删除对象的用户的 IAM 策略中。 正确：S3 Object Lock的法律保留（Legal Hold）功能允许对象保持不可变状态，直到明确移除法律保留。通过IAM权限控制，只有 特定用户可以删除对象，完全符合题目要求。

question: A social media company allows users to upload images to its website. The website runs on Amazon EC2 instances. During upload requests, the website resizes the images to a standard size and stores the resized images in Amazon S3. Users are experiencing slow upload requests to the website.
