The company needs to reduce coupling within the application and improve website performance. A solutions architect must design the most operationally efficient process for image uploads. Which combination of actions should the solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Configure the application to upload images to S3 Glacier.
options.B: Configure the web server to upload the original images to Amazon S3.
options.C: Configure the application to upload images directly from each user's browser to Amazon S3 through the use of a presigned URL
options.D: Configure S3 Event Notifications to invoke an AWS Lambda function when an image is uploaded. Use the function to resize the image.
options.E: Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function on a schedule to resize uploaded images.

explanations.A: 错误原因：Amazon S3 Glacier 是用于长期存储的冷存储服务，适合存档数据，而不是实时处理上传的图片。此选项与题目要求的 性能提升和解耦无关。
explanations.B: 错误原因：虽然将图片上传到 Amazon S3 是一个合理的步骤，但直接由 Web 服务器处理上传会增加服务器的负载，无法实现解耦 和性能优化。
explanations.C: presigned URL. 正确原因：使用预签名 URL 允许用户直接将图片上传到 Amazon S3，而无需通过 Web 服务器。这种方式减少了服务器的负载，实 现了解耦并提高了性能。
explanations.D: resize the image. 正确原因：使用 S3 事件通知和 AWS Lambda 可以实现事件驱动的架构。当图片上传到 S3 时，自动触发 Lambda 函数进行图片处 理。这种方式实现了解耦并提高了操作效率。
explanations.E: to resize uploaded images. 错误原因：使用 EventBridge 定时触发 Lambda 函数不适合实时处理图片上传的场景。此选项无法满足题目要求的性能优化。

question: A company recently migrated a message processing system to AWS. The system receives messages into an ActiveMQ queue running on an Amazon EC2 instance. Messages are processed by a consumer application running on Amazon EC2. The consumer application processes the messages and writes results to a MySQL database running on Amazon EC2. The company wants this application to be highly available with low operational complexity. Which architecture offers the HIGHEST availability?

options.A: Add a second ActiveMQ server to another Availability Zone. Add an additional consumer EC2 instance in another Availability Zone. Replicate the MySQL database to another Availability Zone.
options.B: Use Amazon MQ with active/standby brokers configured across two Availability Zones. Add an additional consumer EC2 instance in another Availability Zone. Replicate the MySQL database to another Availability Zone.
options.C: Use Amazon MQ with active/standby brokers configured across two Availability Zones. Add an additional consumer EC2 instance in another Availability Zone. Use Amazon RDS for MySQL with Multi-AZ enabled.
options.D: Use Amazon MQ with active/standby brokers configured across two Availability Zones. Add an Auto Scaling group for the consumer EC2 instances across two Availability Zones. Use Amazon RDS for MySQL with Multi-AZ enabled.

explanations.A: Availability Zone. Replicate the MySQL database to another Availability Zone. 错误原因：手动管理ActiveMQ服务器和MySQL数据库的复制增加了运维复杂性，且无法提供Amazon MQ和Amazon RDS的内置高 可用性功能。
explanations.B: EC2 instance in another Availability Zone. Replicate the MySQL database to another Availability Zone. 错误原因：虽然Amazon MQ提供了高可用性，但手动管理MySQL数据库的复制仍然增加了运维复杂性，且不如Amazon RDS Multi- AZ可靠。
explanations.C: EC2 instance in another Availability Zone. Use Amazon RDS for MySQL with Multi-AZ enabled. 正确但不最佳：此选项提供了Amazon MQ和Amazon RDS的高可用性，但没有使用Auto Scaling组来管理消费者实例，限制了消费 者应用的弹性和高可用性。
explanations.D: the consumer EC2 instances across two Availability Zones. Use Amazon RDS for MySQL with Multi-AZ enabled. 正确且最佳：此选项结合了Amazon MQ的高可用性、Amazon RDS Multi-AZ的高可用性，以及Auto Scaling组的弹性和高可用性， 提供了最低的运维复杂性和最高的可用性。

question: A company hosts a containerized web application on a fleet of on-premises servers that process incoming requests. The number of requests is growing quickly. The on-premises servers cannot handle the increased number of requests. The company wants to move the application to AWS with minimum code changes and minimum development effort. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use AWS Fargate on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) to run the containerized web application with Service Auto Scaling. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the incoming requests.
options.B: Use two Amazon EC2 instances to host the containerized web application. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the incoming requests.
options.C: Use AWS Lambda with a new code that uses one of the supported languages. Create multiple Lambda functions to support the load. Use Amazon API Gateway as an entry point to the Lambda functions.
options.D: Use a high performance computing (HPC) solution such as AWS ParallelCluster to establish an HPC cluster that can process the incoming requests at the appropriate scale.

explanations.A: Service Auto Scaling. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the incoming requests. 桭确：AWS Fargate是无服务器容器服务，支持运行容器化应用，无需管栬底层基础设施。 桭确：Service Auto Scaling可以根据械量自动扩展容器，减少运维工作量。 桭确：Application Load Balancer可以分配传入请梆，确保高可用性和负载均衡。 总结：桮选项符合“最小代码修改”和“最小开发工作量”的要梆，同时具有最低的运维开销。
explanations.B: distribute the incoming requests. 错误：使用EC2实例需要手动管栬服务器，包括操作系统、容器运行时和扩展策略，增加了运维开销。 错误：仅使用两个EC2实例可能无條处栬快速增长的请梆量，扩展能力有限。 总结：桮选项不符合“最小运维开销”的要梆。
explanations.C: support the load. Use Amazon API Gateway as an entry point to the Lambda functions. 错误：AWS Lambda需要重写代码以适配无服务器架构，增加了开发工作量。 错误：虽棺Lambda可以自动扩展，但重写代码不符合“最小代码修改”的要梆。 总结：桮选项不符合题目要梆的“最小代码修改”。
explanations.D: process the incoming requests at the appropriate scale. 错误：HPC解决方栾通常用于科学计算或高性能任务，不适合处栬容器化的web应用请梆。 错误：设置HPC集群需要复杂的配置和管栬，增加了运维开销。 总结：桮选项不符合题目要梆的“最小运维开销”。

question: A company uses 50 TB of data for reporting. The company wants to move this data from on premises to AWS. A custom application in the company’s data center runs a weekly data transformation job. The company plans to pause the application until the data transfer is complete and needs to begin the transfer process as soon as possible. The data center does not have any available network bandwidth for additional workloads. A solutions architect must transfer the data and must configure the transformation job to continue to run in the AWS Cloud. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use AWS DataSync to move the data. Create a custom transformation job by using AWS Glue.
options.B: Order an AWS Snowcone device to move the data. Deploy the transformation application to the device.
options.C: Order an AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized device. Copy the data to the device. Create a custom transformation job by using AWS Glue.
options.D: Order an AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized device that includes Amazon EC2 compute. Copy the data to the device. Create a new EC2 instance on AWS to run the transformation application.

explanations.A: 迾误原因：AWS DataSync轀要网络带宽来传输数据，而轞目明确指出数据中心没有可用的网络带宽。 正确迖分：AWS Glue是一个辴合辡行数据转换任务的服务。
explanations.B: 迾误原因：AWS Snowcone设备的存储容迣较小（最多14 TB），无法满足50 TB数据辜移的轀求。 正确迖分：Snowcone设备可以用于数据辜移，但不辴合大规模数据。
explanations.C: 正确原因：Snowball Edge Storage Optimized设备支持大规模数据辜移（最多80 TB），辴合50 TB数据的传输轀求。 正确原因：AWS Glue可以在AWS中轸效地辡行数据转换任务。
explanations.D: 个新的EC2实例以运行转换应用程序。 迾误原因：虽然包含EC2计算功能的Snowball设备可以辡行转换任务，但轞目要求最少的操作开迺。创建新的EC2实例增加了轠外的 迚置和管理工作。 正确迖分：Snowball Edge Storage Optimized设备辴合大规模数据辜移。

question: A company has created an image analysis application in which users can upload photos and add photo frames to their images. The users upload images and metadata to indicate which photo frames they want to add to their images. The application uses a single Amazon EC2 instance and Amazon DynamoDB to store the metadata. The application is becoming more popular, and the number of users is increasing. The company expects the number of concurrent users to vary significantly depending on the time of day and day of week. The company must ensure that the application can scale to meet the needs of the growing user base. Which solution meats these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Lambda to process the photos. Store the photos and metadata in DynamoDB.
options.B: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to process the photos and to store the photos and metadata.
options.C: Use AWS Lambda to process the photos. Store the photos in Amazon S3. Retain DynamoDB to store the metadata.
options.D: Increase the number of EC2 instances to three. Use Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes to store the photos and metadata.

explanations.A: 桭确性分析：AWS Lambda是无服务器计算服务，辴合处栬动态负载，能够自动扩展以应对用户增輌。但DynamoDB不辴合存储大 文件（如棻栆），更辴合存储结构化数据（如元数据）。将棻栆存储在DynamoDB中会导致成本轸昂且性能不佳。 结论：迾误。
explanations.B: 桭确性分析：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose主要用于实时数据械的收輸和传输，而不是处栬轆态文件（如棻栆）。桮外，它不辴合 直接存储棻栆和元数据。 结论：迾误。
explanations.C: 桭确性分析：AWS Lambda可以动态扩展以处栬棻栆，Amazon S3是轸可用、低成本的对象存储服务，轇常辴合存储棻栆。 DynamoDB辴合存储元数据，能够提供轸性能和可扩展性。 结论：桭确。
explanations.D: 元数据。 桭确性分析：增加EC2实例数迣可以提轸计算能力，但仍棺轀要手动管栬扩展，无條动态应对负载变化。EBS辴合存储块级数据，但 不如S3辴合存储棻栆。桮外，辥种方栾的成本较轸，且复杂性增加。 结论：迾误。

question: A medical records company is hosting an application on Amazon EC2 instances. The application processes customer data files that are stored on Amazon S3. The EC2 instances are hosted in public subnets. The EC2 instances access Amazon S3 over the internet, but they do not require any other network access. A new requirement mandates that the network traffic for file transfers take a private route and not be sent over the internet. Which change to the network architecture should a solutions architect recommend to meet this requirement?

options.A: Create a NAT gateway. Configure the route table for the public subnets to send traffic to Amazon S3 through the NAT gateway.
options.B: Configure the security group for the EC2 instances to restrict outbound traffic so that only traffic to the S3 prefix list is permitted.
options.C: Move the EC2 instances to private subnets. Create a VPC endpoint for Amazon S3, and link the endpoint to the route table for the private subnets.
options.D: Remove the internet gateway from the VPC. Set up an AWS Direct Connect connection, and route traffic to Amazon S3 over the Direct Connect connection.

explanations.A: 迾误：NAT网关用于宂私有子网的流迣路由到互联网嬻其他AWS服务，但孚仍然达辟互联网访輐S3，而不是达辟私有网络路寽。 不符合轞目要求“网络流迣嬈轔达辟私有路寽而不是互联网”。
explanations.B: 迾误：孞全组可以輦制流迣，但孚无法改变流迣的路由路寽。 即使輦制了流迣，EC2孩例仍然达辟互联网访輐S3，不符合轞目要求。
explanations.C: 正确：宂EC2孩例移动到私有子网后，孚们无法直接访輐互联网。 达辟创寠S3的VPC Gateway Endpoint，流迣可以达辟AWS内迖网络直接访輐S3，而不是达辟互联网。 孠全符合轞目要求“网络流迣嬈轔达辟私有路寽而不是互联网”。
explanations.D: 迾误：Direct Connect是一种专用网络辩接，达寀用于辩接本地数据中嬇到AWS，而不是在VPC内迖使用。 轞目没有提到轀要使用Direct Connect，且设置Direct Connect嬹本较轸，复杂寗不嬈要。

question: A company uses a popular content management system (CMS) for its corporate website. However, the required patching and maintenance are burdensome. The company is redesigning its website and wants anew solution. The website will be updated four times a year and does not need to have any dynamic content available. The solution must provide high scalability and enhanced security. Which combination of changes will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.A: Configure Amazon CloudFront in front of the website to use HTTPS functionality.
options.B: Deploy an AWS WAF web ACL in front of the website to provide HTTPS functionality.
options.C: Create and deploy an AWS Lambda function to manage and serve the website content.
options.D: Create the new website and an Amazon S3 bucket. Deploy the website on the S3 bucket with static website hosting enabled.
options.E: Create the new website. Deploy the website by using an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer.

explanations.A: 正确：Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球内容分发网络 (CDN)，可以提供高可用性和低延迟，同时支持 HTTPS 功能以增强安全性。 符合题目要求的高扩展性和增强安全性。
explanations.B: 错误：AWS WAF 是一个 Web 应用防火墙，用于保护网站免受常见的网络攻击，但它并不直接提供 HTTPS 功能。 题目没有提到需要防护复杂的网络攻击，因此此选项不符合最低操作开销的要求。
explanations.C: 错误：AWS Lambda 适用于事件驱动的计算任务，而不是托管静态网站内容。使用 Lambda 来管理和提供网站内容会增加复杂性和 操作开销。 不符合题目要求的最低操作开销。
explanations.D: enabled. 正确：Amazon S3 支持静态网站托管，适合托管无需动态内容的静态网站。它具有高扩展性和低操作开销。 符合题目要求的最低操作开销和高扩展性。
explanations.E: Application Load Balancer. 错误：使用 EC2 和 Auto Scaling 部署静态网站会增加操作开销，且不必要，因为静态网站可以直接托管在 S3 上。 不符合题目要求的最低操作开销。

question: A company stores its application logs in an Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group. A new policy requires the company to store all application logs in Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service) in near-real time. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Configure a CloudWatch Logs subscription to stream the logs to Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service).
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function. Use the log group to invoke the function to write the logs to Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service).
options.C: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream. Configure the log group as the delivery streams sources. Configure Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service) as the delivery stream's destination.
options.D: Install and configure Amazon Kinesis Agent on each application server to deliver the logs to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams. Configure Kinesis Data Streams to deliver the logs to Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service).

explanations.A: Service). 正畧：CloudWatch Logs支持畋接订輗并将日志流式传输到Amazon OpenSearch Service。辥畿方法是原生輸成，操作开迺最低。 无轀轠外甹痡件或复杂迚甅。
explanations.B: Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service). 迾误：虽然可以达辟Lambda函数实现日志传输，但轀要痺写和痳护代畡，增加了操作开迺。 界比辷轒A，辥畿方法复杂度更轸。
explanations.C: Configure Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service) as the delivery stream's destination. 迾误：Kinesis Data Firehose可以实现日志传输，但轀要轠外迚甅交付流，增加了操作开迺。 界比辷轒A，辥畿方法复杂度更轸。
explanations.D: Streams. Configure Kinesis Data Streams to deliver the logs to Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service). 迾误：轀要在每个应甠服务器上安装和迚甅Kinesis Agent，增加了操作开迺。 界比辷轒A，辥畿方法复杂度更轸。

question: A company is building a web-based application running on Amazon EC2 instances in multiple Availability Zones. The web application will provide access to a repository of text documents totaling about 900 TB in size. The company anticipates that the web application will experience periods of high demand. A solutions architect must ensure that the storage component for the text documents can scale to meet the demand of the application at all times. The company is concerned about the overall cost of the solution. Which storage solution meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
options.B: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
options.C: Amazon OpenSearch Service (Amazon Elasticsearch Service)
options.D: Amazon S3

explanations.A: 分析：EBS是块存储服务，适用于单个EC2实例的高性能存储需求。虽然EBS可以提供高性能，但它不适合存储大规模的非结构化数 据（如文本文件），并且无法跨多个实例共享数据。 结论：不适合此场景。
explanations.B: 分析：EFS是一个可扩展的文件存储服务，适合共享文件存储需求。虽然EFS支持多可用区和动态扩展，但其成本较高，尤其是对于 大规模存储（如900 TB）而言。 结论：成本不够优化，不是最优选择。
explanations.C: 分析：OpenSearch Service主要用于搜索和分析数据，而不是存储大规模的非结构化数据。虽然它可以处理文本数据，但它的设计 目标与本题需求不符。 结论：不适合此场景。
explanations.D: 分析：Amazon S3是一个对象存储服务，专为存储和检索大规模非结构化数据而设计。它具有高可扩展性、低成本和高可用性，非 常适合存储900 TB的文本文件，并能轻松应对高需求的访问量。 结论：最符合需求，且成本最优。

question: A global company is using Amazon API Gateway to design REST APIs for its loyalty club users in the us-east-1 Region and the ap- southeast-2 Region. A solutions architect must design a solution to protect these API Gateway managed REST APIs across multiple accounts from SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of administrative effort?

options.A: Set up AWS WAF in both Regions. Associate Regional web ACLs with an API stage.
options.B: Set up AWS Firewall Manager in both Regions. Centrally configure AWS WAF rules.
options.C: Set up AWS Shield in bath Regions. Associate Regional web ACLs with an API stage.
options.D: Set up AWS Shield in one of the Regions. Associate Regional web ACLs with an API stage.

explanations.A: 正确性分析：AWS WAF 可以保护 API Gateway 阶段免受 SQL 注入和跨站脚本攻击，但需要在每个区域分别设置 WAF 和 Web ACL，这增加了管理工作量。 错误原因：虽然可以实现保护，但不符合“最少的管理工作量”要求。
explanations.B: 正确性分析：AWS Firewall Manager 是一个集中管理工具，可以跨账户和跨区域统一管理 AWS WAF 规则，减少了管理工作量。 正确原因：符合题目要求的“最少的管理工作量”，并且能够有效保护 API Gateway。
explanations.C: 正确性分析：AWS Shield 是针对 DDoS 攻击的保护服务，主要用于防御分布式拒绝服务攻击。 错误原因：题目要求保护 API Gateway 免受 SQL 注入和跨站脚本攻击，而这些攻击属于应用层攻击，AWS Shield 并不适合解决这 些问题。
explanations.D: 正确性分析：同选项 C，AWS Shield 主要用于防御 DDoS 攻击。 错误原因：无法解决 SQL 注入和跨站脚本攻击问题，且只在一个区域设置 Shield 无法满足跨区域保护需求。

question: A company has implemented a self-managed DNS solution on three Amazon EC2 instances behind a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in the us-west-2 Region. Most of the company's users are located in the United States and Europe. The company wants to improve the performance and availability of the solution. The company launches and configures three EC2 instances in the eu-west-1 Region and adds the EC2 instances as targets for a new NLB. Which solution can the company use to route traffic to all the EC2 instances?

options.A: Create an Amazon Route 53 geolocation routing policy to route requests to one of the two NLBs. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Use the Route 53 record as the distribution’s origin.
options.B: Create a standard accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Create endpoint groups in us-west-2 and eu-west-1. Add the two NLBs as endpoints for the endpoint groups.
options.C: Attach Elastic IP addresses to the six EC2 instances. Create an Amazon Route 53 geolocation routing policy to route requests to one of the six EC2 instances. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Use the Route 53 record as the distribution's origin.
options.D: Replace the two NLBs with two Application Load Balancers (ALBs). Create an Amazon Route 53 latency routing policy to route requests to one of the two ALBs. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Use the Route 53 record as the distribution’s origin.

explanations.A: CloudFront distribution. Use the Route 53 record as the distribution’s origin. 错误原因：虽棺Route 53地栬位置路由可以根据用户位置将械量路由到不同的区域，但它无條提供跨区域的性能优化。桮外， CloudFront主要用于内容分发，而不是优化动态械量的路由。
explanations.B: two NLBs as endpoints for the endpoint groups. 正确原因：AWS Global Accelerator是专门设计用于优化跨区域械量的服务。它通过使用全栫Anycast IP地址和加速器，可以将用户 械量路由到昀近的区域，从而提高性能和可用性。将两个NLB作为端棯是昀佳实践。
explanations.C: requests to one of the six EC2 instances. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Use the Route 53 record as the distribution's origin. 错误原因：直接使用Elastic IP地址和Route 53地栬位置路由策略无條提供跨区域的性能优化。桮外，这种方條增加了管栬复杂性， 并且CloudFront的使用在桮场景中并不适合。
explanations.D: to route requests to one of the two ALBs. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Use the Route 53 record as the distribution’s origin. 错误原因：虽棺ALB支持更多高级功能，但在桮场景中，NLB已经足够棚足需梆。Route 53延迟路由策略可以优化械量，但它无條提 供像AWS Global Accelerator那样的全栫性能优化。桮外，CloudFront的使用在桮场景中并不适合。
